714	rbgp_depot_levy() {
715	  zrbgp_sentinel
716	
717	  local -r z_region="${RBRR_GCP_REGION}"
718	
719	  buc_doc_brief "Create new depot infrastructure following RBAGS specification"
720	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
721	
722	  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
723	  local z_token
724	  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"
725	
726	  buc_step 'Validate region against Artifact Registry locations'
727	  local -r z_locations_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/projects/${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}/locations"
728	  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_locations_url}" "${z_token}" "region_validation"
729	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Validate region" "region_validation"
730	
731	  local z_valid_regions
732	  z_valid_regions=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "region_validation" '.locations[].locationId' | tr '\n' ' ') || buc_die "Failed to parse region list"
733	
734	  if ! [[ " ${z_valid_regions} " =~ [[:space:]]${z_region}[[:space:]] ]]; then
735	    buc_die "Invalid region. Valid regions: ${z_valid_regions}"
736	  fi
737	
738	  buc_step 'Create depot project'
739	  local -r z_create_project_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_create_project.json"
740	
741	  # OAuth users create projects without parent (per MPCR)
742	  jq -n \
743	    --arg projectId "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" \
744	    --arg displayName "RB Depot ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}" \
745	    '{
746	      projectId: $projectId,
747	      displayName: $displayName
748	    }' > "${z_create_project_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build project creation body"
749	
750	  local -r z_create_project_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects"
751	  rbgu_http_json_lro_ok \
752	    "Create depot project" \
753	    "${z_token}" \
754	    "${z_create_project_url}" \
755	    "depot_project_create" \
756	    "${z_create_project_body}" \
757	    ".name" \
758	    "${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}" \
759	    "operations/" \
760	    "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" \
761	    "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
762	
763	  buc_step 'Link billing account'
764	  local -r z_billing_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_billing_link.json"
765	  jq -n \
766	    --arg billingAccountName "billingAccounts/${RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID}" \
767	    '{
768	      billingAccountName: $billingAccountName
769	    }' > "${z_billing_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build billing link body"
770	
771	  local -r z_billing_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING}${RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/billingInfo"
772	  rbgu_http_json "PUT" "${z_billing_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_billing_link" "${z_billing_body}"
773	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Link billing account" "depot_billing_link"
774	
775	  buc_step 'Get depot project number'
776	  local -r z_project_info_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
777	  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_project_info"
778	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Get project info" "depot_project_info"
779	
780	  local z_project_number
781	  # CRM v3 returns project number in name field as "projects/{number}"
782	  z_project_number=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_project_info" '.name | sub("projects/"; "")') || buc_die "Failed to get project number"
783	  test -n "${z_project_number}" || buc_die "Project number is empty"
784	
785	  buc_step 'Enable depot project APIs'
786	  local -r z_api_services="artifactregistry cloudbuild cloudresourcemanager containeranalysis iam serviceusage storage"
787	  for z_service in ${z_api_services}; do
788	    rbgu_api_enable "${z_service}" "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" "${z_token}"
789	  done
790	
791	  buc_step 'Create dual worker pools (tether + airgap)'
792	  local -r z_pool_parent="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${z_region}${RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS}"
793	
794	  # Tether pool (default egress — public internet access)
795	  local -r z_tether_id="${RBDC_GCB_POOL_STEM}${RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER}"
796	  local -r z_tether_create_url="${z_pool_parent}?workerPoolId=${z_tether_id}"
797	  local -r z_tether_create_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_pool_tether_create.json"
798	
799	  jq -n --arg machineType "${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}" \
800	    '{
801	      privatePoolV1Config: {
802	        workerConfig: {
803	          machineType: $machineType
804	        }
805	      }
806	    }' > "${z_tether_create_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build tether pool creation body"
807	
808	  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_tether_create_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_pool_tether_create" "${z_tether_create_body}"
809	  local z_tether_create_code
810	  z_tether_create_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_pool_tether_create") || buc_die "Bad tether pool creation HTTP code"
811	  case "${z_tether_create_code}" in
812	    200|201) buc_log_args "Tether pool ${z_tether_id} created" ;;
813	    409)     buc_log_args "Tether pool ${z_tether_id} already exists (idempotent)" ;;
814	    *)       buc_die "Failed to create tether pool: HTTP ${z_tether_create_code}" ;;
815	  esac
816	
817	  # Airgap pool (NO_PUBLIC_EGRESS — no public internet)
818	  local -r z_airgap_id="${RBDC_GCB_POOL_STEM}${RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_AIRGAP}"
819	  local -r z_airgap_create_url="${z_pool_parent}?workerPoolId=${z_airgap_id}"
820	  local -r z_airgap_create_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_pool_airgap_create.json"
821	
822	  jq -n --arg machineType "${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}" \
823	    '{
824	      privatePoolV1Config: {
825	        workerConfig: {
826	          machineType: $machineType
827	        },
828	        networkConfig: {
829	          egressOption: "NO_PUBLIC_EGRESS"
830	        }
831	      }
832	    }' > "${z_airgap_create_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build airgap pool creation body"
833	
834	  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_airgap_create_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_pool_airgap_create" "${z_airgap_create_body}"
835	  local z_airgap_create_code
836	  z_airgap_create_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_pool_airgap_create") || buc_die "Bad airgap pool creation HTTP code"
837	  case "${z_airgap_create_code}" in
838	    200|201) buc_log_args "Airgap pool ${z_airgap_id} created" ;;
839	    409)     buc_log_args "Airgap pool ${z_airgap_id} already exists (idempotent)" ;;
840	    *)       buc_die "Failed to create airgap pool: HTTP ${z_airgap_create_code}" ;;
841	  esac
842	
843	  local -r z_pool_resource="projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${z_region}/workerPools/${RBDC_GCB_POOL_STEM}"
844	  buc_log_args "Pool stem: ${z_pool_resource}"
845	
846	  # Note: OAuth Payor doesn't need explicit permissions on depot since it uses user identity
847	  # Skip Payor permission grants - OAuth user context provides necessary access
848	
849	  buc_step 'Verify IAM propagation before resource creation'
850	  local -r z_preflight_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${z_region}/repositories"
851	  rbgu_poll_until_ok "AR IAM propagation" "${z_preflight_url}" "${z_token}" "iam_preflight"
852	
853	  buc_step 'Create build bucket'
854	  local -r z_bucket_req="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_bucket_create_req.json"
855	  jq -n \
856	    --arg name "${RBDC_GCS_BUCKET}" \
857	    --arg location "${z_region}" \
858	    --arg project "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" \
859	    '{
860	      name: $name,
861	      location: $location,
862	      storageClass: "STANDARD",
863	      lifecycle: { rule: [ { action: { type: "Delete" }, condition: { age: 1 } } ] }
864	    }' > "${z_bucket_req}" || buc_die "Failed to create bucket request JSON"
865	
866	  local -r z_bucket_create_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}/b?project=${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
867	  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_bucket_create_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_bucket_create" "${z_bucket_req}"
868	
869	  local z_bucket_code
870	  z_bucket_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_bucket_create") || buc_die "Bad bucket creation HTTP code"
871	  case "${z_bucket_code}" in
872	    200|201) buc_log_args "Build bucket ${RBDC_GCS_BUCKET} created" ;;
873	    409)     buc_die "Build bucket ${RBDC_GCS_BUCKET} already exists" ;;
874	    *)       buc_die "Failed to create build bucket: HTTP ${z_bucket_code}" ;;
875	  esac
876	
877	  buc_step 'Create container repository'
878	  local -r z_parent="projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${z_region}"
879	  local -r z_create_repo_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_parent}/repositories?repositoryId=${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
880	  local -r z_create_repo_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_create_repo.json"
881	  
882	  jq -n '{format:"DOCKER"}' > "${z_create_repo_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build create-repo body"
883	
884	  rbgu_http_json_lro_ok \
885	    "Create container repository" \
886	    "${z_token}" \
887	    "${z_create_repo_url}" \
888	    "depot_repo_create" \
889	    "${z_create_repo_body}" \
890	    ".name" \
891	    "${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}" \
892	    "${RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL}" \
893	    "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" \
894	    "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
895	
896	  buc_step 'Verify IAM API is ready for service account creation'
897	  local -r z_iam_preflight_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts"
898	  rbgu_poll_until_ok "IAM API" "${z_iam_preflight_url}" "${z_token}" "iam_sa_preflight"
899	
900	  buc_step 'Create Mason service account'
901	  local -r z_mason_name="${RBCC_role_mason}-${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}"
902	  local -r z_mason_display_name="Mason for RB Depot: ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}"
903	  local -r z_create_sa_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_create_mason.json"
904	
905	  jq -n \
906	    --arg accountId "${z_mason_name}" \
907	    --arg displayName "${z_mason_display_name}" \
908	    '{
909	      accountId: $accountId,
910	      serviceAccount: {
911	        displayName: $displayName
912	      }
913	    }' > "${z_create_sa_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build Mason creation body"
914	
915	  local -r z_create_sa_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts"
916	  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_create_sa_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_mason_create" "${z_create_sa_body}"
917	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Create Mason service account" "depot_mason_create"
918	
919	  local z_mason_sa_email
920	  z_mason_sa_email=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_mason_create" '.email') || buc_die "Failed to get Mason email"
921	
922	  buc_step 'Verify Mason service account propagation'
923	  local -r z_mason_sa_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${z_mason_sa_email}"
924	  rbgu_poll_until_ok "Mason SA" "${z_mason_sa_url}" "${z_token}" "mason_sa_preflight"
925	
926	  buc_step 'Configure Mason permissions'
927	  # Repository admin (AR repo IAM requires email, not numeric ID)
928	  rbgi_add_repo_iam_role "${z_token}" "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" "${z_mason_sa_email}" "${z_region}" "${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}" \
929	    "roles/artifactregistry.writer"
930	
931	  # Bucket viewer (GCS bucket IAM requires email, not numeric ID)
932	  rbgi_add_bucket_iam_role "${z_token}" "${RBDC_GCS_BUCKET}" "${z_mason_sa_email}" "roles/storage.objectViewer"
933	
934	  # Project viewer
935	  rbgi_add_project_iam_role "${z_token}" "Grant Mason Project Viewer" "projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" \
936	    "roles/viewer" "serviceAccount:${z_mason_sa_email}" "mason-viewer"
937	
938	  # Logs writer (for Cloud Build logs to Cloud Logging)
939	  rbgi_add_project_iam_role "${z_token}" "Grant Mason Logs Writer" "projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" \
940	    "roles/logging.logWriter" "serviceAccount:${z_mason_sa_email}" "mason-logs-writer"
941	
942	  buc_step 'Provision Cloud Build service agent'
943	  # The Cloud Build Service Agent (service-{PN}@gcp-sa-cloudbuild.iam.gserviceaccount.com)
944	  # needs serviceAccountTokenCreator on Mason to impersonate it during builds.create.
945	  # The service agent is auto-created when the Cloud Build API is enabled; its email is
946	  # deterministic from the project number. See RBSCIP for the two-SA distinction.
947	  rbgu_provision_service_agent "cloudbuild" "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" "${z_token}" > /dev/null \
948	    || buc_die "Failed to provision Cloud Build service agent"
949	  local -r z_cb_service_agent="service-${z_project_number}@gcp-sa-cloudbuild.${RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN}"
950	  buc_log_args "CB service agent: ${z_cb_service_agent}"
951	
952	  buc_step 'Enable Cloud Build service agent to impersonate Mason'
953	  rbgi_add_sa_iam_role "${z_token}" "${z_mason_sa_email}" "${z_cb_service_agent}" "roles/iam.serviceAccountTokenCreator"
954	
955	  buc_step 'Update depot tracking'
956	  zrbgp_depot_list_update || buc_die "Failed to update depot tracking after creation"
957	
958	  buc_success 'Depot creation successful'
959	  buc_info "Next: mantle Governor for this depot:"
960	  buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_MANTLE_GOVERNOR}"
961	}
962	
963	rbgp_depot_unmake() {
964	  zrbgp_sentinel
965	
966	  buc_doc_brief "DANGER: Permanently destroy an entire depot infrastructure"
967	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
968	
969	  buc_step 'Safety confirmation required'
970	  buc_require "DANGER: Permanently destroy depot ${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID} and ALL resources" "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
971	
972	  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
973	  local z_token
974	  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"
975	
976	  buc_step 'Validate target depot'
977	  local -r z_project_info_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
978	  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_validate"
979	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Validate depot project" "depot_destroy_validate"
980	  
981	  local z_lifecycle_state
982	  z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_validate" '.state // "UNKNOWN"') || buc_die "Failed to parse project state"
983	  
984	  if test "${z_lifecycle_state}" != "ACTIVE"; then
985	    if test "${z_lifecycle_state}" = "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
986	      buc_die "Project already marked for deletion"
987	    else
988	      buc_die "Project state is ${z_lifecycle_state} - can only destroy ACTIVE projects"
989	    fi
990	  fi
991	
992	  buc_step 'Clean up governor service accounts (404-tolerant)'
993	  # No standalone demantle verb — governor SA lifecycle ends here.  Project
994	  # deletion would clean these up implicitly, but an explicit DELETE pass
995	  # gives diagnostic visibility and makes the cleanup contract testable.
996	  local -r z_unmake_sa_url_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts"
997	  local z_unmake_sa_page_token=""
998	  local z_unmake_sa_page=1
999	  local z_unmake_sa_url=""
1000	  local z_unmake_sa_tok_enc=""
1001	  local z_unmake_sa_infix=""
1002	  local z_unmake_sa_count=0
1003	  local z_unmake_sa_index=0
1004	  local z_unmake_sa_email=""
1005	  local z_unmake_gov_delete_infix=""
1006	  local z_governor_sa_count=0
1007	  while :; do
1008	    z_unmake_sa_url="${z_unmake_sa_url_base}"
1009	    if test -n "${z_unmake_sa_page_token}"; then
1010	      z_unmake_sa_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_unmake_sa_page_token}") \
1011	        || buc_die "Failed to URL-encode pageToken"
1012	      z_unmake_sa_url="${z_unmake_sa_url}?pageToken=${z_unmake_sa_tok_enc}"
1013	    fi
1014	    z_unmake_sa_infix="depot_unmake_gov_list_${z_unmake_sa_page}"
1015	    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_unmake_sa_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_unmake_sa_infix}"
1016	    rbgu_http_require_ok "List service accounts (page ${z_unmake_sa_page})" "${z_unmake_sa_infix}"
1017	
1018	    z_unmake_sa_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_unmake_sa_infix}" '.accounts // [] | length') \
1019	      || buc_die "Failed to parse SA list"
1020	
1021	    z_unmake_sa_index=0
1022	    while test "${z_unmake_sa_index}" -lt "${z_unmake_sa_count}"; do
1023	      z_unmake_sa_email=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_unmake_sa_infix}" ".accounts[${z_unmake_sa_index}].email") \
1024	        || { z_unmake_sa_index=$((z_unmake_sa_index + 1)); continue; }
1025	      if [[ "${z_unmake_sa_email}" == ${RBCC_role_governor}-* ]]; then
1026	        buc_log_args "Deleting governor SA: ${z_unmake_sa_email}"
1027	        z_unmake_gov_delete_infix="depot_unmake_gov_delete_${z_governor_sa_count}"
1028	        rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_unmake_sa_url_base}/${z_unmake_sa_email}" "${z_token}" "${z_unmake_gov_delete_infix}"
1029	        rbgu_http_require_ok "Delete governor SA ${z_unmake_sa_email}" "${z_unmake_gov_delete_infix}" \
1030	          404 "not found (already deleted)"
1031	        z_governor_sa_count=$((z_governor_sa_count + 1))
1032	      fi
1033	      z_unmake_sa_index=$((z_unmake_sa_index + 1))
1034	    done
1035	
1036	    z_unmake_sa_page_token=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_unmake_sa_infix}" '.nextPageToken') \
1037	      || z_unmake_sa_page_token=""
1038	    test -n "${z_unmake_sa_page_token}" || break
1039	    z_unmake_sa_page=$((z_unmake_sa_page + 1))
1040	  done
1041	  buc_info "Governor SA cleanup: removed ${z_governor_sa_count} account(s)"
1042	
1043	  buc_step 'Check for and remove liens'
1044	  local -r z_liens_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens?parent=projects%2F${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
1045	  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_liens_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_liens_list"
1046	  rbgu_http_require_ok "List liens" "depot_destroy_liens_list"
1047	  
1048	  local z_lien_count
1049	  z_lien_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_liens_list" '.liens // [] | length') || buc_die "Failed to parse liens response"
1050	  
1051	  if test "${z_lien_count}" -gt 0; then
1052	    buc_log_args "Found ${z_lien_count} lien(s) - removing them"
1053	    local z_lien_names
1054	    z_lien_names=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_liens_list" '.liens[].name' | tr '\n' ' ') || buc_die "Failed to extract lien names"
1055	    
1056	    for z_lien_name in ${z_lien_names}; do
1057	      if test -n "${z_lien_name}"; then
1058	        buc_log_args "Removing lien: ${z_lien_name}"
1059	        local z_delete_lien_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens/${z_lien_name}"
1060	        rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_lien_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_lien_delete"
1061	        rbgu_http_require_ok "Delete lien" "depot_destroy_lien_delete"
1062	      fi
1063	    done
1064	  fi
1065	
1066	  buc_step 'Unlink billing account (releases quota immediately)'
1067	  local -r z_billing_unlink_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_billing_unlink.json"
1068	  echo '{"billingAccountName":""}' > "${z_billing_unlink_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build billing unlink body"
1069	
1070	  local -r z_billing_unlink_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING}${RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/billingInfo"
1071	  rbgu_http_json "PUT" "${z_billing_unlink_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_billing_unlink" "${z_billing_unlink_body}"
1072	
1073	  local z_billing_unlink_code
1074	  z_billing_unlink_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_billing_unlink") || z_billing_unlink_code=""
1075	  if test "${z_billing_unlink_code}" = "200"; then
1076	    buc_log_args "Billing account unlinked - quota released"
1077	  else
1078	    buc_warn "Could not unlink billing (HTTP ${z_billing_unlink_code}) - proceeding with deletion anyway"
1079	  fi
1080	
1081	  buc_step 'Delete dual worker pools (if exist)'
1082	  # Delete tether pool
1083	  local -r z_tether_del_id="${RBDC_GCB_POOL_STEM}${RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER}"
1084	  local -r z_tether_del_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}${RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS}/${z_tether_del_id}"
1085	  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_tether_del_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_pool_tether"
1086	  local z_tether_del_code
1087	  z_tether_del_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_pool_tether") || z_tether_del_code=""
1088	  case "${z_tether_del_code}" in
1089	    200|204|404) buc_log_args "Tether pool ${z_tether_del_id} cleanup: HTTP ${z_tether_del_code}" ;;
1090	    *) buc_warn "Tether pool cleanup failed: HTTP ${z_tether_del_code} — proceeding" ;;
1091	  esac
1092	
1093	  # Delete airgap pool
1094	  local -r z_airgap_del_id="${RBDC_GCB_POOL_STEM}${RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_AIRGAP}"
1095	  local -r z_airgap_del_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}${RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS}/${z_airgap_del_id}"
1096	  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_airgap_del_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_pool_airgap"
1097	  local z_airgap_del_code
1098	  z_airgap_del_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_pool_airgap") || z_airgap_del_code=""
1099	  case "${z_airgap_del_code}" in
1100	    200|204|404) buc_log_args "Airgap pool ${z_airgap_del_id} cleanup: HTTP ${z_airgap_del_code}" ;;
1101	    *) buc_warn "Airgap pool cleanup failed: HTTP ${z_airgap_del_code} — proceeding" ;;
1102	  esac
1103	
1104	  buc_step 'Initiate depot deletion'
1105	  local -r z_delete_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
1106	  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_delete"
1107	  
1108	  local z_delete_response
1109	  z_delete_response=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_delete") || buc_die "Failed to get deletion response code"
1110	  
1111	  if test "${z_delete_response}" = "200" || test "${z_delete_response}" = "204"; then
1112	    buc_log_args "Project deletion initiated successfully"
1113	  else
1114	    local z_error_msg
1115	    z_error_msg=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_delete" '.error.message // "Unknown error"') || z_error_msg="HTTP ${z_delete_response}"
1116	    buc_die "Failed to initiate project deletion: ${z_error_msg}"
1117	  fi
1118	
1119	  buc_step 'Verify deletion state transition'
1120	  local -r z_max_attempts=12
1121	  local z_attempt=1
1122	  local z_final_state
1123	  
1124	  while test "${z_attempt}" -le "${z_max_attempts}"; do
1125	    sleep 5
1126	    buc_log_args "Checking deletion state (attempt ${z_attempt}/${z_max_attempts})"
1127	    
1128	    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_state_check"
1129	
1130	    local z_state_check_code
1131	    z_state_check_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_state_check") || z_state_check_code=""
1132	    if test "${z_state_check_code}" = "200"; then
1133	      z_final_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_state_check" '.state // "UNKNOWN"') || z_final_state="UNKNOWN"
1134	
1135	      if test "${z_final_state}" = "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
1136	        break
1137	      fi
1138	    fi
1139	    
1140	    z_attempt=$((z_attempt + 1))
1141	  done
1142	  
1143	  if test "${z_final_state}" != "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
1144	    buc_die "Failed to verify deletion state transition. Current state: ${z_final_state}"
1145	  fi
1146	
1147	  buc_step 'Update depot tracking'
1148	  zrbgp_depot_list_update || buc_log_args "Warning: Failed to update depot tracking after deletion"
1149	
1150	  # Success
1151	  buc_success "Depot ${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID} successfully marked for deletion"
1152	  buc_info "Project Status: DELETE_REQUESTED"
1153	  buc_info "Billing: Unlinked (quota released immediately)"
1154	  buc_info "Grace period: Up to 30 days before permanent removal"
1155	  buc_info "All infrastructure (Mason SA, repository, bucket) will be automatically removed"
1156	}

1158	rbgp_depot_list() {
1159	  zrbgp_sentinel
1160	
1161	  buc_doc_brief "List all depot instances and their status"
1162	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
1163	
1164	  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
1165	  local z_token
1166	  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"
1167	
1168	  buc_step 'Probe depot states and emit per-moniker fact files'
1169	  zrbgp_depot_state_emit "${z_token}"
1170	
1171	  buc_step 'Render depot summary'
1172	  local z_total_count=0
1173	  local z_complete_count=0
1174	  local z_delete_requested_count=0
1175	
1176	  buc_info ""
1177	  buc_info "=== DEPOT SUMMARY ==="
1178	  printf "%-40s %s\n" "PROJECT_ID" "STATUS"
1179	
1180	  # Per-iteration synthesized locals (BCG exception 2)
1181	  local z_fact_path=""
1182	  local z_basename=""
1183	  local z_moniker=""
1184	  local z_project_id=""
1185	  local z_project_fact_path=""
1186	  local z_state=""
1187	
1188	  # Walk emitted depot fact files; stem is the moniker, content is the state.
1189	  # The sidecar depot-project fact file carries the canonical project_id.
1190	  shopt -s nullglob
1191	  for z_fact_path in "${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}"/*.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}; do
1192	    z_basename="${z_fact_path##*/}"
1193	    z_moniker="${z_basename%.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}}"
1194	    z_project_fact_path="${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${z_moniker}.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot_project}"
1195	    z_state=$(<"${z_fact_path}")
1196	    test -n "${z_state}" || buc_die "Empty state in fact file: ${z_fact_path}"
1197	    test -f "${z_project_fact_path}" || buc_die "Missing depot-project fact file: ${z_project_fact_path}"
1198	    z_project_id=$(<"${z_project_fact_path}")
1199	    test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "Empty project_id in fact file: ${z_project_fact_path}"
1200	
1201	    printf "%-40s %s\n" "${z_project_id}" "${z_state}"
1202	    z_total_count=$((z_total_count + 1))
1203	    case "${z_state}" in
1204	      "${RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_COMPLETE}")          z_complete_count=$((z_complete_count + 1)) ;;
1205	      "${RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_DELETE_REQUESTED}")  z_delete_requested_count=$((z_delete_requested_count + 1)) ;;
1206	    esac
1207	  done
1208	  shopt -u nullglob
1209	
1210	  if test "${z_total_count}" -eq 0; then
1211	    buc_info "No depot projects found"
1212	    return 0
1213	  fi
1214	
1215	  buc_info ""
1216	  buc_info "=== SUMMARY ==="
1217	  buc_info "Total depots:     ${z_total_count}"
1218	  buc_info "Complete:         ${z_complete_count}"
1219	  buc_info "Delete-requested: ${z_delete_requested_count}"
1220	}

1222	rbgp_payor_oauth_refresh() {
1223	  zrbgp_sentinel
1224	
1225	  buc_doc_brief "Refresh expired OAuth credentials following RBAGS manual procedure"
1226	  buc_doc_lines "Use this when OAuth tokens expire after 6 months or are compromised"
1227	  buc_doc_lines "Requires downloading new OAuth JSON from Google Cloud Console"
1228	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
1229	
1230	  buc_step 'Display OAuth refresh procedure'
1231	  buc_info ""
1232	  buc_info "=== Manual Payor OAuth Refresh Procedure ==="
1233	  buc_info ""
1234	  buc_info "OAuth credentials need to be refreshed. Follow these steps:"
1235	  buc_info ""
1236	  buc_info "1. Navigate to APIs & Services > Credentials in Payor Project"
1237	  buc_info "   Console URL: https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
1238	  buc_info ""
1239	  buc_info "2. Find existing 'Recipe Bottle Payor' OAuth client"
1240	  buc_info ""  
1241	  buc_info "3. Download new JSON credentials:"
1242	  buc_info "   - Click the download icon next to the OAuth client"
1243	  buc_info "   - Or regenerate client secret if compromised"
1244	  buc_info ""
1245	  date +%Y%m%d > "${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || true
1246	  local z_today_stamp=$(<"${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}")
1247	  buc_info "4. Save as timestamped file:"
1248	  buc_info "   - Example: payor-oauth-${z_today_stamp}.json"
1249	  buc_info ""
1250	  buc_info "5. Run installation command with new JSON:"
1251	  buc_info "   rbgp_payor_install /path/to/payor-oauth-[timestamp].json"
1252	  buc_info ""
1253	  buc_info "This will regenerate OAuth credentials and update RBRO file."
1254	  buc_info ""
1255	  
1256	  buc_success "OAuth refresh procedure displayed"
1257	  buc_info "Note: OAuth refresh tokens expire after 6 months of non-use in testing mode"
1258	  buc_info "Any successful payor operation resets the 6-month timer"
1259	}

1261	rbgp_governor_mantle() {
1262	  zrbgp_sentinel
1263	
1264	  local -r z_depot_project_id="${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
1265	
1266	  buc_doc_brief "Create or replace Governor service account in a depot"
1267	  buc_doc_lines "This operation is idempotent: existing governor-* SAs are deleted before creating a new one"
1268	  buc_doc_lines "Targets depot derived from RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX + RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER (RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID)"
1269	  buc_doc_shown || return 0
1270	
1271	  buc_step 'Validate input parameters'
1272	  test -n "${z_depot_project_id}" || buc_die "RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is empty — set RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX and RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER in rbrr.env"
1273	
1274	  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
1275	  test -n "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID is not set"
1276	  test -n "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID is not set"
1277	
1278	  local z_token
1279	  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"
1280	
1281	  buc_step 'Validate depot project exists and is active'
1282	  local -r z_project_info_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}"
1283	  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO}"
1284	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Validate depot project" "${ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO}"
1285	
1286	  local z_lifecycle_state
1287	  z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO}" '.state') || buc_die "Failed to get project state"
1288	  test "${z_lifecycle_state}" = "ACTIVE" || buc_die "Depot project is not ACTIVE (state: ${z_lifecycle_state})"
1289	
1290	  test "${z_depot_project_id}" != "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}" || buc_die "Cannot create Governor in Payor project"
1291	
1292	  buc_step 'Clean up existing governor-* service accounts (404-tolerant)'
1293	  local -r z_sa_list_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/serviceAccounts"
1294	  local z_deleted_count=0
1295	  local z_mantle_sa_page_token=""
1296	  local z_mantle_sa_page=1
1297	  local z_mantle_sa_url=""
1298	  local z_mantle_sa_tok_enc=""
1299	  local z_mantle_sa_infix=""
1300	  local z_mantle_sa_count=0
1301	  local z_mantle_sa_index=0
1302	  local z_mantle_sa_email=""
1303	  local z_mantle_delete_infix=""
1304	  local z_mantle_delete_attempt=0
1305	  local z_mantle_delete_code=""
1306	  while :; do
1307	    z_mantle_sa_url="${z_sa_list_url}"
1308	    if test -n "${z_mantle_sa_page_token}"; then
1309	      z_mantle_sa_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_mantle_sa_page_token}") \
1310	        || buc_die "Failed to URL-encode pageToken"
1311	      z_mantle_sa_url="${z_mantle_sa_url}?pageToken=${z_mantle_sa_tok_enc}"
1312	    fi
1313	    z_mantle_sa_infix="${ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_LIST_SA}_${z_mantle_sa_page}"
1314	    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_mantle_sa_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_mantle_sa_infix}"
1315	    rbgu_http_require_ok "List service accounts (page ${z_mantle_sa_page})" "${z_mantle_sa_infix}"
1316	
1317	    z_mantle_sa_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_mantle_sa_infix}" '.accounts // [] | length') \
1318	      || buc_die "Failed to parse SA list"
1319	
1320	    z_mantle_sa_index=0
1321	    while test "${z_mantle_sa_index}" -lt "${z_mantle_sa_count}"; do
1322	      z_mantle_sa_email=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_mantle_sa_infix}" ".accounts[${z_mantle_sa_index}].email") \
1323	        || { z_mantle_sa_index=$((z_mantle_sa_index + 1)); continue; }
1324	      if [[ "${z_mantle_sa_email}" == ${RBCC_role_governor}-* ]]; then
1325	        buc_log_args "Deleting existing governor SA: ${z_mantle_sa_email}"
1326	        z_mantle_delete_infix="${ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_DELETE_SA}_${z_mantle_delete_attempt}"
1327	        rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_sa_list_url}/${z_mantle_sa_email}" "${z_token}" "${z_mantle_delete_infix}"
1328	        z_mantle_delete_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_mantle_delete_infix}") || z_mantle_delete_code=""
1329	        case "${z_mantle_delete_code}" in
1330	          200|204) z_deleted_count=$((z_deleted_count + 1)) ;;
1331	          404)     buc_log_args "SA already deleted: ${z_mantle_sa_email}" ;;
1332	          *)       buc_warn "Failed to delete SA ${z_mantle_sa_email}: HTTP ${z_mantle_delete_code}" ;;
1333	        esac
1334	        z_mantle_delete_attempt=$((z_mantle_delete_attempt + 1))
1335	      fi
1336	      z_mantle_sa_index=$((z_mantle_sa_index + 1))
1337	    done
1338	
1339	    z_mantle_sa_page_token=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_mantle_sa_infix}" '.nextPageToken') \
1340	      || z_mantle_sa_page_token=""
1341	    test -n "${z_mantle_sa_page_token}" || break
1342	    z_mantle_sa_page=$((z_mantle_sa_page + 1))
1343	  done
1344	
1345	  buc_info "Deleted ${z_deleted_count} existing governor service account(s)"
1346	
1347	  buc_step 'Generate Governor timestamp and account ID'
1348	  local z_timestamp
1349	  date +%Y%m%d%H%M > "${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}" \
1350	    || buc_die "Failed to generate timestamp"
1351	  z_timestamp=$(<"${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}")
1352	  local -r z_governor_account_id="${RBCC_role_governor}-${z_timestamp}"
1353	  local z_governor_email
1354	  z_governor_email=$(rbgu_sa_email_capture "${z_governor_account_id}" "${z_depot_project_id}") \
1355	    || buc_die "Failed to compose Governor email"
1356	
1357	  buc_log_args "Governor account ID: ${z_governor_account_id}"
1358	
1359	  buc_step 'Create Governor service account'
1360	  local -r z_create_sa_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_create_governor.json"
1361	  jq -n \
1362	    --arg accountId "${z_governor_account_id}" \
1363	    --arg displayName "Governor for RB Depot" \
1364	    '{
1365	      accountId: $accountId,
1366	      serviceAccount: {
1367	        displayName: $displayName
1368	      }
1369	    }' > "${z_create_sa_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build Governor creation body"
1370	
1371	  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_sa_list_url}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_CREATE_SA}" "${z_create_sa_body}"
1372	  rbgu_http_require_ok "Create Governor service account" "${ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_CREATE_SA}"
1373	
1374	  buc_log_args "Governor service account created: ${z_governor_email}"
1375	  buf_write_fact_single "${RBGP_FACT_GOVERNOR_SA_EMAIL}" "${z_governor_email}"
1376	
1377	  buc_step 'Wait for Governor SA propagation'
1378	  local -r z_verify_url="${z_sa_list_url}/${z_governor_email}"
1379	  rbgu_poll_until_ok "Governor SA" "${z_verify_url}" "${z_token}" "gov_verify"
1380	
1381	  # No fixed sleep needed: rbgi_add_project_iam_role retries on "does not exist"
1382	  # propagation errors with exponential backoff (see RBSCIP trade study)
1383	
1384	  buc_step 'Grant roles/owner on depot project'
1385	  rbgi_add_project_iam_role \
1386	    "${z_token}" \
1387	    "Grant Governor Owner" \
1388	    "projects/${z_depot_project_id}" \
1389	    "roles/owner" \
1390	    "serviceAccount:${z_governor_email}" \
1391	    "governor-owner"
1392	
1393	  buc_step 'Generate service account key (with propagation retry)'
1394	  local -r z_key_req="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_governor_key_request.json"
1395	  printf '%s' '{"privateKeyType": "TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE"}' > "${z_key_req}"
1396	
1397	  local -r z_key_url="${z_sa_list_url}/${z_governor_email}/keys"
1398	  local z_key_attempt=0
1399	  local z_gov_key_infix=""
1400	  local z_key_code=""
1401	  while :; do
1402	    z_key_attempt=$((z_key_attempt + 1))
1403	    z_gov_key_infix="${ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_KEY}-attempt${z_key_attempt}"
1404	    rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_key_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_gov_key_infix}" "${z_key_req}"
1405	
1406	    z_key_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_gov_key_infix}") || z_key_code=""
1407	
1408	    if test "${z_key_code}" = "200"; then
1409	      break
1410	    fi
1411	
1412	    if test "${z_key_code}" = "404" && test "${z_key_attempt}" -lt "${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX}"; then
1413	      buc_warn "keys.create returned 404 (SA write-path propagation delay), retry ${z_key_attempt}/${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX} in ${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC}s..."
1414	      sleep "${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC}"
1415	      continue
1416	    fi
1417	
1418	    rbgu_http_require_ok "Generate Governor key" "${z_gov_key_infix}"
1419	  done
1420	
1421	  buc_step 'Extract and decode key data'
1422	  local z_key_b64
1423	  z_key_b64=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_gov_key_infix}" '.privateKeyData') \
1424	    || buc_die "Failed to extract privateKeyData"
1425	
1426	  local -r z_key_json="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_governor_key.json"
1427	  printf '%s' "${z_key_b64}" | openssl enc -base64 -d -A > "${z_key_json}" \
1428	    || buc_die "Failed to decode key data"
1429	
1430	  buc_step 'Convert JSON key to RBRA format'
1431	  local -r z_rbra_file="${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/governor-${z_timestamp}.rbra"
1432	
1433	  local z_client_email
1434	  z_client_email=$(jq -r '.client_email' "${z_key_json}") || buc_die "Failed to extract client_email"
1435	  test -n "${z_client_email}" || buc_die "Empty client_email in key JSON"
1436	
1437	  local z_private_key
1438	  z_private_key=$(jq -r '.private_key' "${z_key_json}") || buc_die "Failed to extract private_key"
1439	  test -n "${z_private_key}" || buc_die "Empty private_key in key JSON"
1440	
1441	  local z_project_id
1442	  z_project_id=$(jq -r '.project_id' "${z_key_json}") || buc_die "Failed to extract project_id"
1443	  test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "Empty project_id in key JSON"
1444	
1445	  buc_step 'Write RBRA file'
1446	  {
1447	    printf 'RBRA_ROLE=%s\n' "${RBCC_role_governor}"
1448	    printf 'RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL="%s"\n'      "${z_client_email}"
1449	    printf 'RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY="'; printf '%s' "${z_private_key}"; printf '"\n'
1450	    printf 'RBRA_PROJECT_ID="%s"\n'        "${z_project_id}"
1451	    printf 'RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC=1800\n'
1452	  } > "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_file}"
1453	
1454	  test -f "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_file}"
1455	
1456	  rm -f "${z_key_json}" || buc_die "Failed to remove temp key file: ${z_key_json}"
1457	
1458	  buc_success "Governor reset completed successfully"
1459	  buc_info "Governor service account: ${z_governor_email}"
1460	  buc_info "RBRA file written: ${z_rbra_file}"
1461	  buc_info ""
1462	  buc_info "Install the RBRA file:"
1463	  buc_bare "        cp ${z_rbra_file} ${RBDC_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE}"
1464	  buc_info ""
1465	  buc_info "Or, for assay (test) mode:"
1466	  buc_bare "        cp ${z_rbra_file} ${RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE}"
1467	}
1468	
1469	# eof
1470

file.content:
buc_success "Payor OAuth installation completed successfully"
  buc_info "Credentials stored: ${z_rbro_file}"
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "Configuration required in rbrp.env:"
  buc_info "  RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID=${z_project_id}"
  buc_info "  RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID=${z_client_id}"
  buc_info "  RBRP_OPERATOR_EMAIL=${z_operator_email}"
  buc_info "  RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID=<obtain from Cloud Console Billing>"
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "Next: rbgp_depot_levy"
  buc_info "  (set RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER and RBRR_GCP_REGION in rbrr.env first)"
}

rbgp_depot_levy() {
  zrbgp_sentinel

  local -r z_region="${RBRR_GCP_REGION}"

  buc_doc_brief "Create new depot infrastructure following RBAGS specification"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
  local z_token
  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"

  buc_step 'Validate region against Artifact Registry locations'
  local -r z_locations_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/projects/${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}/locations"
  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_locations_url}" "${z_token}" "region_validation"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "Validate region" "region_validation"

  local z_valid_regions
  z_valid_regions=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "region_validation" '.locations[].locationId' | tr '\n' ' ') || buc_die "Failed to parse region list"

  if ! [[ " ${z_valid_regions} " =~ [[:space:]]${z_region}[[:space:]] ]]; then
    buc_die "Invalid region. Valid regions: ${z_valid_regions}"
  fi

  buc_step 'Create depot project'
  local -r z_create_project_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_create_project.json"

  # OAuth users create projects without parent (per MPCR)
  jq -n \
    --arg projectId "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" \
    --arg displayName "RB Depot ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}" \
    '{
      projectId: $projectId,
      displayName: $displayName
    }' > "${z_create_project_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build project creation body"

  local -r z_create_project_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects"
  rbgu_http_json_lro_ok \
    "Create depot project" \
    "${z_token}" \
    "${z_create_project_url}" \
    "depot_project_create" \
    "${z_create_project_body}" \
    ".name" \
    "${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}" \
    "operations/" \
    "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" \
    "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"

  buc_step 'Link billing account'
  local -r z_billing_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_billing_link.json"
  jq -n \
    --arg billingAccountName "billingAccounts/${RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID}" \
    '{
      billingAccountName: $billingAccountName
    }' > "${z_billing_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build billing link body"

  local -r z_billing_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING}${RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/billingInfo"
  rbgu_http_json "PUT" "${z_billing_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_billing_link" "${z_billing_body}"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "Link billing account" "depot_billing_link"

  buc_step 'Get depot project number'
  local -r z_project_info_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_project_info"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "Get project info" "depot_project_info"

  local z_project_number
  # CRM v3 returns project number in name field as "projects/{number}"
  z_project_number=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_project_info" '.name | sub("projects/"; "")') || buc_die "Failed to get project number"
  test -n "${z_project_number}" || buc_die "Project number is empty"

  buc_step 'Enable depot project APIs'
  local -r z_api_services="artifactregistry cloudbuild cloudresourcemanager containeranalysis iam serviceusage storage"
  for z_service in ${z_api_services}; do
    rbgu_api_enable "${z_service}" "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" "${z_token}"
  done

  buc_step 'Create dual worker pools (tether + airgap)'
  local -r z_pool_parent="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${z_region}${RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS}"

  # Tether pool (default egress — public internet access)
  local -r z_tether_id="${RBDC_GCB_POOL_STEM}${RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER}"
  local -r z_tether_create_url="${z_pool_parent}?workerPoolId=${z_tether_id}"
  local -r z_tether_create_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_pool_tether_create.json"

  jq -n --arg machineType "${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}" \
    '{
      privatePoolV1Config: {
        workerConfig: {
          machineType: $machineType
        }
      }
    }' > "${z_tether_create_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build tether pool creation body"

  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_tether_create_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_pool_tether_create" "${z_tether_create_body}"
  local z_tether_create_code
  z_tether_create_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_pool_tether_create") || buc_die "Bad tether pool creation HTTP code"
  case "${z_tether_create_code}" in
    200|201) buc_log_args "Tether pool ${z_tether_id} created" ;;
    409)     buc_log_args "Tether pool ${z_tether_id} already exists (idempotent)" ;;
    *)       buc_die "Failed to create tether pool: HTTP ${z_tether_create_code}" ;;
  esac

  # Airgap pool (NO_PUBLIC_EGRESS — no public internet)
  local -r z_airgap_id="${RBDC_GCB_POOL_STEM}${RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_AIRGAP}"
  local -r z_airgap_create_url="${z_pool_parent}?workerPoolId=${z_airgap_id}"
  local -r z_airgap_create_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_pool_airgap_create.json"

  jq -n --arg machineType "${RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE}" \
    '{
      privatePoolV1Config: {
        workerConfig: {
          machineType: $machineType
        },
        networkConfig: {
          egressOption: "NO_PUBLIC_EGRESS"
        }
      }
    }' > "${z_airgap_create_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build airgap pool creation body"

  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_airgap_create_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_pool_airgap_create" "${z_airgap_create_body}"
  local z_airgap_create_code
  z_airgap_create_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_pool_airgap_create") || buc_die "Bad airgap pool creation HTTP code"
  case "${z_airgap_create_code}" in
    200|201) buc_log_args "Airgap pool ${z_airgap_id} created" ;;
    409)     buc_log_args "Airgap pool ${z_airgap_id} already exists (idempotent)" ;;
    *)       buc_die "Failed to create airgap pool: HTTP ${z_airgap_create_code}" ;;
  esac

  local -r z_pool_resource="projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${z_region}/workerPools/${RBDC_GCB_POOL_STEM}"
  buc_log_args "Pool stem: ${z_pool_resource}"

  # Note: OAuth Payor doesn't need explicit permissions on depot since it uses user identity
  # Skip Payor permission grants - OAuth user context provides necessary access

  buc_step 'Verify IAM propagation before resource creation'
  local -r z_preflight_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${z_region}/repositories"
  rbgu_poll_until_ok "AR IAM propagation" "${z_preflight_url}" "${z_token}" "iam_preflight"

  buc_step 'Create build bucket'
  local -r z_bucket_req="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_bucket_create_req.json"
  jq -n \
    --arg name "${RBDC_GCS_BUCKET}" \
    --arg location "${z_region}" \
    --arg project "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" \
    '{
      name: $name,
      location: $location,
      storageClass: "STANDARD",
      lifecycle: { rule: [ { action: { type: "Delete" }, condition: { age: 1 } } ] }
    }' > "${z_bucket_req}" || buc_die "Failed to create bucket request JSON"

  local -r z_bucket_create_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}/b?project=${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_bucket_create_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_bucket_create" "${z_bucket_req}"

  local z_bucket_code
  z_bucket_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_bucket_create") || buc_die "Bad bucket creation HTTP code"
  case "${z_bucket_code}" in
    200|201) buc_log_args "Build bucket ${RBDC_GCS_BUCKET} created" ;;
    409)     buc_die "Build bucket ${RBDC_GCS_BUCKET} already exists" ;;
    *)       buc_die "Failed to create build bucket: HTTP ${z_bucket_code}" ;;
  esac

  buc_step 'Create container repository'
  local -r z_parent="projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${z_region}"
  local -r z_create_repo_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_parent}/repositories?repositoryId=${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}"
  local -r z_create_repo_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_create_repo.json"
  
  jq -n '{format:"DOCKER"}' > "${z_create_repo_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build create-repo body"

  rbgu_http_json_lro_ok \
    "Create container repository" \
    "${z_token}" \
    "${z_create_repo_url}" \
    "depot_repo_create" \
    "${z_create_repo_body}" \
    ".name" \
    "${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}" \
    "${RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL}" \
    "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" \
    "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"

  buc_step 'Verify IAM API is ready for service account creation'
  local -r z_iam_preflight_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts"
  rbgu_poll_until_ok "IAM API" "${z_iam_preflight_url}" "${z_token}" "iam_sa_preflight"

  buc_step 'Create Mason service account'
  local -r z_mason_name="${RBCC_role_mason}-${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}"
  local -r z_mason_display_name="Mason for RB Depot: ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}"
  local -r z_create_sa_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_create_mason.json"

  jq -n \
    --arg accountId "${z_mason_name}" \
    --arg displayName "${z_mason_display_name}" \
    '{
      accountId: $accountId,
      serviceAccount: {
        displayName: $displayName
      }
    }' > "${z_create_sa_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build Mason creation body"

  local -r z_create_sa_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts"
  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_create_sa_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_mason_create" "${z_create_sa_body}"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "Create Mason service account" "depot_mason_create"

  local z_mason_sa_email
  z_mason_sa_email=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_mason_create" '.email') || buc_die "Failed to get Mason email"

  buc_step 'Verify Mason service account propagation'
  local -r z_mason_sa_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts/${z_mason_sa_email}"
  rbgu_poll_until_ok "Mason SA" "${z_mason_sa_url}" "${z_token}" "mason_sa_preflight"

  buc_step 'Configure Mason permissions'
  # Repository admin (AR repo IAM requires email, not numeric ID)
  rbgi_add_repo_iam_role "${z_token}" "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" "${z_mason_sa_email}" "${z_region}" "${RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY}" \
    "roles/artifactregistry.writer"

  # Bucket viewer (GCS bucket IAM requires email, not numeric ID)
  rbgi_add_bucket_iam_role "${z_token}" "${RBDC_GCS_BUCKET}" "${z_mason_sa_email}" "roles/storage.objectViewer"

  # Project viewer
  rbgi_add_project_iam_role "${z_token}" "Grant Mason Project Viewer" "projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" \
    "roles/viewer" "serviceAccount:${z_mason_sa_email}" "mason-viewer"

  # Logs writer (for Cloud Build logs to Cloud Logging)
  rbgi_add_project_iam_role "${z_token}" "Grant Mason Logs Writer" "projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" \
    "roles/logging.logWriter" "serviceAccount:${z_mason_sa_email}" "mason-logs-writer"

  buc_step 'Provision Cloud Build service agent'
  # The Cloud Build Service Agent (service-{PN}@gcp-sa-cloudbuild.iam.gserviceaccount.com)
  # needs serviceAccountTokenCreator on Mason to impersonate it during builds.create.
  # The service agent is auto-created when the Cloud Build API is enabled; its email is
  # deterministic from the project number. See RBSCIP for the two-SA distinction.
  rbgu_provision_service_agent "cloudbuild" "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}" "${z_token}" > /dev/null \
    || buc_die "Failed to provision Cloud Build service agent"
  local -r z_cb_service_agent="service-${z_project_number}@gcp-sa-cloudbuild.${RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN}"
  buc_log_args "CB service agent: ${z_cb_service_agent}"

  buc_step 'Enable Cloud Build service agent to impersonate Mason'
  rbgi_add_sa_iam_role "${z_token}" "${z_mason_sa_email}" "${z_cb_service_agent}" "roles/iam.serviceAccountTokenCreator"

  buc_step 'Update depot tracking'
  zrbgp_depot_list_update || buc_die "Failed to update depot tracking after creation"

  buc_success 'Depot creation successful'
  buc_info "Next: mantle Governor for this depot:"
  buc_tabtarget "${RBZ_MANTLE_GOVERNOR}"
}

rbgp_depot_unmake() {
  zrbgp_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "DANGER: Permanently destroy an entire depot infrastructure"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step 'Safety confirmation required'
  buc_require "DANGER: Permanently destroy depot ${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID} and ALL resources" "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"

  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
  local z_token
  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"

  buc_step 'Validate target depot'
  local -r z_project_info_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_validate"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "Validate depot project" "depot_destroy_validate"
  
  local z_lifecycle_state
  z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_validate" '.state // "UNKNOWN"') || buc_die "Failed to parse project state"
  
  if test "${z_lifecycle_state}" != "ACTIVE"; then
    if test "${z_lifecycle_state}" = "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
      buc_die "Project already marked for deletion"
    else
      buc_die "Project state is ${z_lifecycle_state} - can only destroy ACTIVE projects"
    fi
  fi

  buc_step 'Clean up governor service accounts (404-tolerant)'
  # No standalone demantle verb — governor SA lifecycle ends here.  Project
  # deletion would clean these up implicitly, but an explicit DELETE pass
  # gives diagnostic visibility and makes the cleanup contract testable.
  local -r z_unmake_sa_url_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/serviceAccounts"
  local z_unmake_sa_page_token=""
  local z_unmake_sa_page=1
  local z_unmake_sa_url=""
  local z_unmake_sa_tok_enc=""
  local z_unmake_sa_infix=""
  local z_unmake_sa_count=0
  local z_unmake_sa_index=0
  local z_unmake_sa_email=""
  local z_unmake_gov_delete_infix=""
  local z_governor_sa_count=0
  while :; do
    z_unmake_sa_url="${z_unmake_sa_url_base}"
    if test -n "${z_unmake_sa_page_token}"; then
      z_unmake_sa_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_unmake_sa_page_token}") \
        || buc_die "Failed to URL-encode pageToken"
      z_unmake_sa_url="${z_unmake_sa_url}?pageToken=${z_unmake_sa_tok_enc}"
    fi
    z_unmake_sa_infix="depot_unmake_gov_list_${z_unmake_sa_page}"
    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_unmake_sa_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_unmake_sa_infix}"
    rbgu_http_require_ok "List service accounts (page ${z_unmake_sa_page})" "${z_unmake_sa_infix}"

    z_unmake_sa_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_unmake_sa_infix}" '.accounts // [] | length') \
      || buc_die "Failed to parse SA list"

    z_unmake_sa_index=0
    while test "${z_unmake_sa_index}" -lt "${z_unmake_sa_count}"; do
      z_unmake_sa_email=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_unmake_sa_infix}" ".accounts[${z_unmake_sa_index}].email") \
        || { z_unmake_sa_index=$((z_unmake_sa_index + 1)); continue; }
      if [[ "${z_unmake_sa_email}" == ${RBCC_role_governor}-* ]]; then
        buc_log_args "Deleting governor SA: ${z_unmake_sa_email}"
        z_unmake_gov_delete_infix="depot_unmake_gov_delete_${z_governor_sa_count}"
        rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_unmake_sa_url_base}/${z_unmake_sa_email}" "${z_token}" "${z_unmake_gov_delete_infix}"
        rbgu_http_require_ok "Delete governor SA ${z_unmake_sa_email}" "${z_unmake_gov_delete_infix}" \
          404 "not found (already deleted)"
        z_governor_sa_count=$((z_governor_sa_count + 1))
      fi
      z_unmake_sa_index=$((z_unmake_sa_index + 1))
    done

    z_unmake_sa_page_token=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_unmake_sa_infix}" '.nextPageToken') \
      || z_unmake_sa_page_token=""
    test -n "${z_unmake_sa_page_token}" || break
    z_unmake_sa_page=$((z_unmake_sa_page + 1))
  done
  buc_info "Governor SA cleanup: removed ${z_governor_sa_count} account(s)"

  buc_step 'Check for and remove liens'
  local -r z_liens_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens?parent=projects%2F${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_liens_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_liens_list"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "List liens" "depot_destroy_liens_list"
  
  local z_lien_count
  z_lien_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_liens_list" '.liens // [] | length') || buc_die "Failed to parse liens response"
  
  if test "${z_lien_count}" -gt 0; then
    buc_log_args "Found ${z_lien_count} lien(s) - removing them"
    local z_lien_names
    z_lien_names=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_liens_list" '.liens[].name' | tr '\n' ' ') || buc_die "Failed to extract lien names"
    
    for z_lien_name in ${z_lien_names}; do
      if test -n "${z_lien_name}"; then
        buc_log_args "Removing lien: ${z_lien_name}"
        local z_delete_lien_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens/${z_lien_name}"
        rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_lien_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_lien_delete"
        rbgu_http_require_ok "Delete lien" "depot_destroy_lien_delete"
      fi
    done
  fi

  buc_step 'Unlink billing account (releases quota immediately)'
  local -r z_billing_unlink_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_billing_unlink.json"
  echo '{"billingAccountName":""}' > "${z_billing_unlink_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build billing unlink body"

  local -r z_billing_unlink_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING}${RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/billingInfo"
  rbgu_http_json "PUT" "${z_billing_unlink_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_billing_unlink" "${z_billing_unlink_body}"

  local z_billing_unlink_code
  z_billing_unlink_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_billing_unlink") || z_billing_unlink_code=""
  if test "${z_billing_unlink_code}" = "200"; then
    buc_log_args "Billing account unlinked - quota released"
  else
    buc_warn "Could not unlink billing (HTTP ${z_billing_unlink_code}) - proceeding with deletion anyway"
  fi

  buc_step 'Delete dual worker pools (if exist)'
  # Delete tether pool
  local -r z_tether_del_id="${RBDC_GCB_POOL_STEM}${RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER}"
  local -r z_tether_del_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}${RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS}/${z_tether_del_id}"
  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_tether_del_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_pool_tether"
  local z_tether_del_code
  z_tether_del_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_pool_tether") || z_tether_del_code=""
  case "${z_tether_del_code}" in
    200|204|404) buc_log_args "Tether pool ${z_tether_del_id} cleanup: HTTP ${z_tether_del_code}" ;;
    *) buc_warn "Tether pool cleanup failed: HTTP ${z_tether_del_code} — proceeding" ;;
  esac

  # Delete airgap pool
  local -r z_airgap_del_id="${RBDC_GCB_POOL_STEM}${RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_AIRGAP}"
  local -r z_airgap_del_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD}${RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}/locations/${RBRR_GCP_REGION}${RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS}/${z_airgap_del_id}"
  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_airgap_del_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_pool_airgap"
  local z_airgap_del_code
  z_airgap_del_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_pool_airgap") || z_airgap_del_code=""
  case "${z_airgap_del_code}" in
    200|204|404) buc_log_args "Airgap pool ${z_airgap_del_id} cleanup: HTTP ${z_airgap_del_code}" ;;
    *) buc_warn "Airgap pool cleanup failed: HTTP ${z_airgap_del_code} — proceeding" ;;
  esac

  buc_step 'Initiate depot deletion'
  local -r z_delete_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
  rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_delete_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_delete"
  
  local z_delete_response
  z_delete_response=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_delete") || buc_die "Failed to get deletion response code"
  
  if test "${z_delete_response}" = "200" || test "${z_delete_response}" = "204"; then
    buc_log_args "Project deletion initiated successfully"
  else
    local z_error_msg
    z_error_msg=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_delete" '.error.message // "Unknown error"') || z_error_msg="HTTP ${z_delete_response}"
    buc_die "Failed to initiate project deletion: ${z_error_msg}"
  fi

  buc_step 'Verify deletion state transition'
  local -r z_max_attempts=12
  local z_attempt=1
  local z_final_state
  
  while test "${z_attempt}" -le "${z_max_attempts}"; do
    sleep 5
    buc_log_args "Checking deletion state (attempt ${z_attempt}/${z_max_attempts})"
    
    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "depot_destroy_state_check"

    local z_state_check_code
    z_state_check_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "depot_destroy_state_check") || z_state_check_code=""
    if test "${z_state_check_code}" = "200"; then
      z_final_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "depot_destroy_state_check" '.state // "UNKNOWN"') || z_final_state="UNKNOWN"

      if test "${z_final_state}" = "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
        break
      fi
    fi
    
    z_attempt=$((z_attempt + 1))
  done
  
  if test "${z_final_state}" != "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
    buc_die "Failed to verify deletion state transition. Current state: ${z_final_state}"
  fi

  buc_step 'Update depot tracking'
  zrbgp_depot_list_update || buc_log_args "Warning: Failed to update depot tracking after deletion"

  # Success
  buc_success "Depot ${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID} successfully marked for deletion"
  buc_info "Project Status: DELETE_REQUESTED"
  buc_info "Billing: Unlinked (quota released immediately)"
  buc_info "Grace period: Up to 30 days before permanent removal"
  buc_info "All infrastructure (Mason SA, repository, bucket) will be automatically removed"
}

rbgp_depot_list() {
  zrbgp_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "List all depot instances and their status"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
  local z_token
  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"

  buc_step 'Probe depot states and emit per-moniker fact files'
  zrbgp_depot_state_emit "${z_token}"

  buc_step 'Render depot summary'
  local z_total_count=0
  local z_complete_count=0
  local z_delete_requested_count=0

  buc_info ""
  buc_info "=== DEPOT SUMMARY ==="
  printf "%-40s %s\n" "PROJECT_ID" "STATUS"

  # Per-iteration synthesized locals (BCG exception 2)
  local z_fact_path=""
  local z_basename=""
  local z_moniker=""
  local z_project_id=""
  local z_project_fact_path=""
  local z_state=""

  # Walk emitted depot fact files; stem is the moniker, content is the state.
  # The sidecar depot-project fact file carries the canonical project_id.
  shopt -s nullglob
  for z_fact_path in "${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}"/*.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}; do
    z_basename="${z_fact_path##*/}"
    z_moniker="${z_basename%.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}}"
    z_project_fact_path="${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/${z_moniker}.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot_project}"
    z_state=$(<"${z_fact_path}")
    test -n "${z_state}" || buc_die "Empty state in fact file: ${z_fact_path}"
    test -f "${z_project_fact_path}" || buc_die "Missing depot-project fact file: ${z_project_fact_path}"
    z_project_id=$(<"${z_project_fact_path}")
    test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "Empty project_id in fact file: ${z_project_fact_path}"

    printf "%-40s %s\n" "${z_project_id}" "${z_state}"
    z_total_count=$((z_total_count + 1))
    case "${z_state}" in
      "${RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_COMPLETE}")          z_complete_count=$((z_complete_count + 1)) ;;
      "${RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_DELETE_REQUESTED}")  z_delete_requested_count=$((z_delete_requested_count + 1)) ;;
    esac
  done
  shopt -u nullglob

  if test "${z_total_count}" -eq 0; then
    buc_info "No depot projects found"
    return 0
  fi

  buc_info ""
  buc_info "=== SUMMARY ==="
  buc_info "Total depots:     ${z_total_count}"
  buc_info "Complete:         ${z_complete_count}"
  buc_info "Delete-requested: ${z_delete_requested_count}"
}

rbgp_payor_oauth_refresh() {
  zrbgp_sentinel

  buc_doc_brief "Refresh expired OAuth credentials following RBAGS manual procedure"
  buc_doc_lines "Use this when OAuth tokens expire after 6 months or are compromised"
  buc_doc_lines "Requires downloading new OAuth JSON from Google Cloud Console"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step 'Display OAuth refresh procedure'
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "=== Manual Payor OAuth Refresh Procedure ==="
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "OAuth credentials need to be refreshed. Follow these steps:"
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "1. Navigate to APIs & Services > Credentials in Payor Project"
  buc_info "   Console URL: https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials?project=${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}"
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "2. Find existing 'Recipe Bottle Payor' OAuth client"
  buc_info ""  
  buc_info "3. Download new JSON credentials:"
  buc_info "   - Click the download icon next to the OAuth client"
  buc_info "   - Or regenerate client secret if compromised"
  buc_info ""
  date +%Y%m%d > "${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}" 2>/dev/null || true
  local z_today_stamp=$(<"${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}")
  buc_info "4. Save as timestamped file:"
  buc_info "   - Example: payor-oauth-${z_today_stamp}.json"
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "5. Run installation command with new JSON:"
  buc_info "   rbgp_payor_install /path/to/payor-oauth-[timestamp].json"
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "This will regenerate OAuth credentials and update RBRO file."
  buc_info ""
  
  buc_success "OAuth refresh procedure displayed"
  buc_info "Note: OAuth refresh tokens expire after 6 months of non-use in testing mode"
  buc_info "Any successful payor operation resets the 6-month timer"
}

rbgp_governor_mantle() {
  zrbgp_sentinel

  local -r z_depot_project_id="${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"

  buc_doc_brief "Create or replace Governor service account in a depot"
  buc_doc_lines "This operation is idempotent: existing governor-* SAs are deleted before creating a new one"
  buc_doc_lines "Targets depot derived from RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX + RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER (RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID)"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step 'Validate input parameters'
  test -n "${z_depot_project_id}" || buc_die "RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is empty — set RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX and RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER in rbrr.env"

  buc_step 'Authenticate as Payor'
  test -n "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID is not set"
  test -n "${RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID:-}" || buc_die "RBRP_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID is not set"

  local z_token
  z_token=$(zrbgp_authenticate_capture) || buc_die "Failed to authenticate as Payor via OAuth"

  buc_step 'Validate depot project exists and is active'
  local -r z_project_info_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}"
  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_project_info_url}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO}"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "Validate depot project" "${ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO}"

  local z_lifecycle_state
  z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGP_INFIX_PROJECT_INFO}" '.state') || buc_die "Failed to get project state"
  test "${z_lifecycle_state}" = "ACTIVE" || buc_die "Depot project is not ACTIVE (state: ${z_lifecycle_state})"

  test "${z_depot_project_id}" != "${RBRP_PAYOR_PROJECT_ID}" || buc_die "Cannot create Governor in Payor project"

  buc_step 'Clean up existing governor-* service accounts (404-tolerant)'
  local -r z_sa_list_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${z_depot_project_id}/serviceAccounts"
  local z_deleted_count=0
  local z_mantle_sa_page_token=""
  local z_mantle_sa_page=1
  local z_mantle_sa_url=""
  local z_mantle_sa_tok_enc=""
  local z_mantle_sa_infix=""
  local z_mantle_sa_count=0
  local z_mantle_sa_index=0
  local z_mantle_sa_email=""
  local z_mantle_delete_infix=""
  local z_mantle_delete_attempt=0
  local z_mantle_delete_code=""
  while :; do
    z_mantle_sa_url="${z_sa_list_url}"
    if test -n "${z_mantle_sa_page_token}"; then
      z_mantle_sa_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_mantle_sa_page_token}") \
        || buc_die "Failed to URL-encode pageToken"
      z_mantle_sa_url="${z_mantle_sa_url}?pageToken=${z_mantle_sa_tok_enc}"
    fi
    z_mantle_sa_infix="${ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_LIST_SA}_${z_mantle_sa_page}"
    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_mantle_sa_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_mantle_sa_infix}"
    rbgu_http_require_ok "List service accounts (page ${z_mantle_sa_page})" "${z_mantle_sa_infix}"

    z_mantle_sa_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_mantle_sa_infix}" '.accounts // [] | length') \
      || buc_die "Failed to parse SA list"

    z_mantle_sa_index=0
    while test "${z_mantle_sa_index}" -lt "${z_mantle_sa_count}"; do
      z_mantle_sa_email=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_mantle_sa_infix}" ".accounts[${z_mantle_sa_index}].email") \
        || { z_mantle_sa_index=$((z_mantle_sa_index + 1)); continue; }
      if [[ "${z_mantle_sa_email}" == ${RBCC_role_governor}-* ]]; then
        buc_log_args "Deleting existing governor SA: ${z_mantle_sa_email}"
        z_mantle_delete_infix="${ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_DELETE_SA}_${z_mantle_delete_attempt}"
        rbgu_http_json "DELETE" "${z_sa_list_url}/${z_mantle_sa_email}" "${z_token}" "${z_mantle_delete_infix}"
        z_mantle_delete_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_mantle_delete_infix}") || z_mantle_delete_code=""
        case "${z_mantle_delete_code}" in
          200|204) z_deleted_count=$((z_deleted_count + 1)) ;;
          404)     buc_log_args "SA already deleted: ${z_mantle_sa_email}" ;;
          *)       buc_warn "Failed to delete SA ${z_mantle_sa_email}: HTTP ${z_mantle_delete_code}" ;;
        esac
        z_mantle_delete_attempt=$((z_mantle_delete_attempt + 1))
      fi
      z_mantle_sa_index=$((z_mantle_sa_index + 1))
    done

    z_mantle_sa_page_token=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_mantle_sa_infix}" '.nextPageToken') \
      || z_mantle_sa_page_token=""
    test -n "${z_mantle_sa_page_token}" || break
    z_mantle_sa_page=$((z_mantle_sa_page + 1))
  done

  buc_info "Deleted ${z_deleted_count} existing governor service account(s)"

  buc_step 'Generate Governor timestamp and account ID'
  local z_timestamp
  date +%Y%m%d%H%M > "${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to generate timestamp"
  z_timestamp=$(<"${ZRBGP_SCRATCH_FILE}")
  local -r z_governor_account_id="${RBCC_role_governor}-${z_timestamp}"
  local z_governor_email
  z_governor_email=$(rbgu_sa_email_capture "${z_governor_account_id}" "${z_depot_project_id}") \
    || buc_die "Failed to compose Governor email"

  buc_log_args "Governor account ID: ${z_governor_account_id}"

  buc_step 'Create Governor service account'
  local -r z_create_sa_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_create_governor.json"
  jq -n \
    --arg accountId "${z_governor_account_id}" \
    --arg displayName "Governor for RB Depot" \
    '{
      accountId: $accountId,
      serviceAccount: {
        displayName: $displayName
      }
    }' > "${z_create_sa_body}" || buc_die "Failed to build Governor creation body"

  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_sa_list_url}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_CREATE_SA}" "${z_create_sa_body}"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "Create Governor service account" "${ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_CREATE_SA}"

  buc_log_args "Governor service account created: ${z_governor_email}"
  buf_write_fact_single "${RBGP_FACT_GOVERNOR_SA_EMAIL}" "${z_governor_email}"

  buc_step 'Wait for Governor SA propagation'
  local -r z_verify_url="${z_sa_list_url}/${z_governor_email}"
  rbgu_poll_until_ok "Governor SA" "${z_verify_url}" "${z_token}" "gov_verify"

  # No fixed sleep needed: rbgi_add_project_iam_role retries on "does not exist"
  # propagation errors with exponential backoff (see RBSCIP trade study)

  buc_step 'Grant roles/owner on depot project'
  rbgi_add_project_iam_role \
    "${z_token}" \
    "Grant Governor Owner" \
    "projects/${z_depot_project_id}" \
    "roles/owner" \
    "serviceAccount:${z_governor_email}" \
    "governor-owner"

  buc_step 'Generate service account key (with propagation retry)'
  local -r z_key_req="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_governor_key_request.json"
  printf '%s' '{"privateKeyType": "TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE"}' > "${z_key_req}"

  local -r z_key_url="${z_sa_list_url}/${z_governor_email}/keys"
  local z_key_attempt=0
  local z_gov_key_infix=""
  local z_key_code=""
  while :; do
    z_key_attempt=$((z_key_attempt + 1))
    z_gov_key_infix="${ZRBGP_INFIX_GOV_KEY}-attempt${z_key_attempt}"
    rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_key_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_gov_key_infix}" "${z_key_req}"

    z_key_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_gov_key_infix}") || z_key_code=""

    if test "${z_key_code}" = "200"; then
      break
    fi

    if test "${z_key_code}" = "404" && test "${z_key_attempt}" -lt "${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX}"; then
      buc_warn "keys.create returned 404 (SA write-path propagation delay), retry ${z_key_attempt}/${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX} in ${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC}s..."
      sleep "${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC}"
      continue
    fi

    rbgu_http_require_ok "Generate Governor key" "${z_gov_key_infix}"
  done

  buc_step 'Extract and decode key data'
  local z_key_b64
  z_key_b64=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_gov_key_infix}" '.privateKeyData') \
    || buc_die "Failed to extract privateKeyData"

  local -r z_key_json="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgp_governor_key.json"
  printf '%s' "${z_key_b64}" | openssl enc -base64 -d -A > "${z_key_json}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to decode key data"

  buc_step 'Convert JSON key to RBRA format'
  local -r z_rbra_file="${BURD_OUTPUT_DIR}/governor-${z_timestamp}.rbra"

  local z_client_email
  z_client_email=$(jq -r '.client_email' "${z_key_json}") || buc_die "Failed to extract client_email"
  test -n "${z_client_email}" || buc_die "Empty client_email in key JSON"

  local z_private_key
  z_private_key=$(jq -r '.private_key' "${z_key_json}") || buc_die "Failed to extract private_key"
  test -n "${z_private_key}" || buc_die "Empty private_key in key JSON"

  local z_project_id
  z_project_id=$(jq -r '.project_id' "${z_key_json}") || buc_die "Failed to extract project_id"
  test -n "${z_project_id}" || buc_die "Empty project_id in key JSON"

  buc_step 'Write RBRA file'
  {
    printf 'RBRA_ROLE=%s\n' "${RBCC_role_governor}"
    printf 'RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL="%s"\n'      "${z_client_email}"
    printf 'RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY="'; printf '%s' "${z_private_key}"; printf '"\n'
    printf 'RBRA_PROJECT_ID="%s"\n'        "${z_project_id}"
    printf 'RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC=1800\n'
  } > "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_file}"

  test -f "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_file}"

  rm -f "${z_key_json}" || buc_die "Failed to remove temp key file: ${z_key_json}"

  buc_success "Governor reset completed successfully"
  buc_info "Governor service account: ${z_governor_email}"
  buc_info "RBRA file written: ${z_rbra_file}"
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "Install the RBRA file:"
  buc_bare "        cp ${z_rbra_file} ${RBDC_GOVERNOR_RBRA_FILE}"
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "Or, for assay (test) mode:"
  buc_bare "        cp ${z_rbra_file} ${RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE}"
}

# eof

lastPrompt: proceed.  Try to use sonnet agents in parallel to do the work, and check it after, for speed.
proceed.  Try to use sonnet agents in parallel to do the work, and check it after, for speed.

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
