11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle GCP Constants - Implementation (no printf required)
20	
21	set -euo pipefail
22	
23	# Multiple inclusion detection
24	# (Module state remains ZRBGC_* per BCG; external constants use RBGC_*)
25	test -z "${ZRBGC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
26	ZRBGC_SOURCED=1
27	
28	######################################################################
29	# Internal Functions (zrbgc_*)
30	
31	zrbgc_kindle() {
32	  test -z "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc already kindled"
33	
34	  # Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)
35	  # These resources compete in globally-unique namespaces across all of GCP
36	  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
37	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
38	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
39	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
40	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"
41	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT="+%y%m%d%H%M%S"
42	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN=12
43	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX="[0-9]{${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"
44	
45	  # Global resource validation patterns
46	  # Payor:  rbwg-p-YYMMDDHHMMSS  (timestamp survives — payor is installation-scoped, not depot-scoped)
47	  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PAYOR_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"
48	
49	  # Basic Configuration
50	  readonly RBGC_ADMIN_ROLE="rbw-admin"
51	  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_ROLE="rbw-payor"
52	  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME="Recipe Bottle Payor"
53	
54	  # Timeouts
55	  readonly RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC=90
56	  readonly RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC=3
57	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX=7
58	  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC=10
59	
60	  # URL Roots & Well-known Endpoints
61	  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL="https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token"
62	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM="https://iam.googleapis.com"
63	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM="https://cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
64	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com"
65	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
66	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD="https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com"
67	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING="https://cloudbilling.googleapis.com"
68	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE="https://storage.googleapis.com"
69	  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER="https://secretmanager.googleapis.com"
70	  readonly RBGC_CONSOLE_URL="https://console.cloud.google.com/"
71	  readonly RBGC_SIGNUP_URL="https://cloud.google.com/free"
72	
73	  # OAuth Scopes
74	  readonly RBGC_SCOPE_CLOUD_PLATFORM="https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform"
75	
76	  # Service Usage Service Identifiers
77	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_IAM="iam.googleapis.com"
78	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_CRM="cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
79	  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
80	
81	  # Email/Domain Assembly
82	  readonly RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN="iam.gserviceaccount.com"
83	
84	  # API Version Paths
85	  readonly RBGC_IAM_V1="/v1"
86	  readonly RBGC_CRM_V1="/v1"
87	  readonly RBGC_CRM_V3="/v3"
88	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1="/v1"
89	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1="/v1beta1"
90	  readonly RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1="/v1"
91	  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1="/v1"
92	  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1="/v1"
93	  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1="/storage/v1"
94	  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_UPLOAD="/upload/storage/v1"
95	  readonly RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1="/v1"
96	
97	  # REST Path Fragments
98	  readonly RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS="/projects"
99	  readonly RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS="/locations"
100	  readonly RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES="/repositories"
101	  readonly RBGC_PATH_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS="/serviceAccounts"
102	  readonly RBGC_PATH_KEYS="/keys"
103	
104	  # REST Operation Suffixes
105	  readonly RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":getIamPolicy"
106	  readonly RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":setIamPolicy"
107	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX=":enable"
108	  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_PATH_SERVICES="/services"
109	
110	  # Operation Prefixes
111	  readonly RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL="operations/"
112	
113	  # Ark Artifact Basenames (₢A_AAK layout)
114	  # Each ark type is a plain basename sibling under <prefix>hallmarks/<hallmark>/.
115	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE="image"
116	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT="about"
117	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH="vouch"
118	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS="diags"
119	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST="attest"
120	  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_POUCH="pouch"
121	
122	  # GAR Categorical Namespaces (₢A_AAK layout)
123	  # Top-level prefix-rooted namespaces under which hallmark/reliquary/enshrine
124	  # arks are stored as plain basename siblings. Consumed by rbgl_GarLayout.sh.
125	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS="hallmarks"
126	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_RELIQUARIES="reliquaries"
127	  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_ENSHRINES="enshrines"
128	
129	  # Reliquary Tool Basenames (₢A_AAK layout)
130	  # Canonical tool names under <prefix>reliquaries/<date>/. Authoritative
131	  # manifest lives in rbgji/rbgji01-inscribe-mirror.sh.
132	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_GCLOUD="gcloud"
133	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_DOCKER="docker"
134	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_ALPINE="alpine"
135	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SYFT="syft"
136	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_BINFMT="binfmt"
137	  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SKOPEO="skopeo"
138	
139	  # Fact-file filenames (written to BURD_OUTPUT_DIR by producers, read by tests)
140	  readonly RBF_FACT_HALLMARK="rbf_fact_hallmark"
141	  readonly RBF_FACT_BUILD_ID="rbf_fact_build_id"
142	  readonly RBF_FACT_GAR_ROOT="rbf_fact_gar_root"
143	  readonly RBF_FACT_ARK_STEM="rbf_fact_ark_stem"
144	  readonly RBF_FACT_ARK_YIELD="rbf_fact_ark_yield"
145	  readonly RBF_FACT_RELIQUARY="rbf_fact_reliquary"
146	
147	  # Payor fact-file filenames (governor identifying values)
148	  readonly RBGP_FACT_GOVERNOR_SA_EMAIL="rbgp_fact_governor_sa_email"
149	
150	  # Depot lifecycle-state vocabulary. Fact-file extensions live in RBCC.
151	  # rbgp_depot_list emits one fact file per known depot named
152	  # "<moniker>.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}" with content equal to one of the values below.
153	  readonly RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_COMPLETE="COMPLETE"
154	  readonly RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_DELETE_REQUESTED="DELETE_REQUESTED"
155	
156	  # Artifact Registry (GAR) Composition
157	  readonly RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX="-docker.pkg.dev"
158	
159	
160	  # Canonical Role IDs
161	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_READER="roles/artifactregistry.reader"
162	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_WRITER="roles/artifactregistry.writer"
163	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_ADMIN="roles/artifactregistry.admin"
164	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_CONTAINERANALYSIS_OCCURRENCES_VIEWER="roles/containeranalysis.occurrences.viewer"
165	  readonly RBGC_ROLE_CLOUDBUILD_BUILDS_EDITOR="roles/cloudbuild.builds.editor"
166	
167	  # Common API Base Paths (project-independent)
168	  readonly RBGC_API_BASE_GCS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}"
169	
170	  # Cloud Resource Manager - Liens API
171	  readonly RBGC_API_CRM_LIST_LIENS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"
172	  readonly RBGC_API_CRM_DELETE_LIEN="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"
173	
174	  # Google Cloud Storage (GCS) APIs (project-independent)
175	  readonly RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS="${RBGC_API_BASE_GCS}/b"
176	
177	  readonly RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM="linux/amd64"
178	
179	
180	  # Worker pool infrastructure (dual pools: tether + airgap)
181	  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER="-tether"
182	  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_AIRGAP="-airgap"
183	  readonly RBGC_WORKER_POOL_SUFFIX="-pool"
184	  readonly RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS="/workerPools"
185	
186	  readonly ZRBGC_KINDLED=1
187	}
188	
189	zrbgc_sentinel() {
190	  test "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgc not kindled - call zrbgc_kindle first"
191	}
192	
193	# eof
194	
195

# Recipe Bottle GCP Constants - Implementation (no printf required)

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
# (Module state remains ZRBGC_* per BCG; external constants use RBGC_*)
test -z "${ZRBGC_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBGC_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbgc_*)

zrbgc_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgc already kindled"

  # Global Resource Naming (Google Cloud global namespace)
  # These resources compete in globally-unique namespaces across all of GCP
  # Pattern: {prefix}-{type}-{name}-{timestamp} where timestamp is YYMMDDHHMMSS
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX="rbwg"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR="p"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_DEPOT="d"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_BUCKET="b"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_FORMAT="+%y%m%d%H%M%S"
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN=12
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX="[0-9]{${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_LEN}}"

  # Global resource validation patterns
  # Payor:  rbwg-p-YYMMDDHHMMSS  (timestamp survives — payor is installation-scoped, not depot-scoped)
  readonly RBGC_GLOBAL_PAYOR_REGEX="^${RBGC_GLOBAL_PREFIX}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TYPE_PAYOR}-${RBGC_GLOBAL_TIMESTAMP_REGEX}$"

  # Basic Configuration
  readonly RBGC_ADMIN_ROLE="rbw-admin"
  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_ROLE="rbw-payor"
  readonly RBGC_PAYOR_APP_NAME="Recipe Bottle Payor"

  # Timeouts
  readonly RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC=90
  readonly RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC=3
  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX=7
  readonly RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC=10

  # URL Roots & Well-known Endpoints
  readonly RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL="https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM="https://iam.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM="https://cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SERVICEUSAGE="https://serviceusage.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="https://artifactregistry.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBUILD="https://cloudbuild.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_CLOUDBILLING="https://cloudbilling.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE="https://storage.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER="https://secretmanager.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_CONSOLE_URL="https://console.cloud.google.com/"
  readonly RBGC_SIGNUP_URL="https://cloud.google.com/free"

  # OAuth Scopes
  readonly RBGC_SCOPE_CLOUD_PLATFORM="https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform"

  # Service Usage Service Identifiers
  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_IAM="iam.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_CRM="cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY="artifactregistry.googleapis.com"

  # Email/Domain Assembly
  readonly RBGC_SA_EMAIL_DOMAIN="iam.gserviceaccount.com"

  # API Version Paths
  readonly RBGC_IAM_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_CRM_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_CRM_V3="/v3"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_V1BETA1="/v1beta1"
  readonly RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBUILD_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_CLOUDBILLING_V1="/v1"
  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1="/storage/v1"
  readonly RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_UPLOAD="/upload/storage/v1"
  readonly RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1="/v1"

  # REST Path Fragments
  readonly RBGC_PATH_PROJECTS="/projects"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_LOCATIONS="/locations"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_REPOSITORIES="/repositories"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS="/serviceAccounts"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_KEYS="/keys"

  # REST Operation Suffixes
  readonly RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":getIamPolicy"
  readonly RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX=":setIamPolicy"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_ENABLE_SUFFIX=":enable"
  readonly RBGC_SERVICEUSAGE_PATH_SERVICES="/services"

  # Operation Prefixes
  readonly RBGC_OP_PREFIX_GLOBAL="operations/"

  # Ark Artifact Basenames (₢A_AAK layout)
  # Each ark type is a plain basename sibling under <prefix>hallmarks/<hallmark>/.
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_IMAGE="image"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ABOUT="about"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_VOUCH="vouch"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_DIAGS="diags"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_ATTEST="attest"
  readonly RBGC_ARK_BASENAME_POUCH="pouch"

  # GAR Categorical Namespaces (₢A_AAK layout)
  # Top-level prefix-rooted namespaces under which hallmark/reliquary/enshrine
  # arks are stored as plain basename siblings. Consumed by rbgl_GarLayout.sh.
  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_HALLMARKS="hallmarks"
  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_RELIQUARIES="reliquaries"
  readonly RBGC_GAR_CATEGORY_ENSHRINES="enshrines"

  # Reliquary Tool Basenames (₢A_AAK layout)
  # Canonical tool names under <prefix>reliquaries/<date>/. Authoritative
  # manifest lives in rbgji/rbgji01-inscribe-mirror.sh.
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_GCLOUD="gcloud"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_DOCKER="docker"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_ALPINE="alpine"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SYFT="syft"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_BINFMT="binfmt"
  readonly RBGC_RELIQUARY_TOOL_SKOPEO="skopeo"

  # Fact-file filenames (written to BURD_OUTPUT_DIR by producers, read by tests)
  readonly RBF_FACT_HALLMARK="rbf_fact_hallmark"
  readonly RBF_FACT_BUILD_ID="rbf_fact_build_id"
  readonly RBF_FACT_GAR_ROOT="rbf_fact_gar_root"
  readonly RBF_FACT_ARK_STEM="rbf_fact_ark_stem"
  readonly RBF_FACT_ARK_YIELD="rbf_fact_ark_yield"
  readonly RBF_FACT_RELIQUARY="rbf_fact_reliquary"

  # Payor fact-file filenames (governor identifying values)
  readonly RBGP_FACT_GOVERNOR_SA_EMAIL="rbgp_fact_governor_sa_email"

  # Depot lifecycle-state vocabulary. Fact-file extensions live in RBCC.
  # rbgp_depot_list emits one fact file per known depot named
  # "<moniker>.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}" with content equal to one of the values below.
  readonly RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_COMPLETE="COMPLETE"
  readonly RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_DELETE_REQUESTED="DELETE_REQUESTED"

  # Artifact Registry (GAR) Composition
  readonly RBGC_GAR_HOST_SUFFIX="-docker.pkg.dev"


  # Canonical Role IDs
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_READER="roles/artifactregistry.reader"
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_WRITER="roles/artifactregistry.writer"
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_ADMIN="roles/artifactregistry.admin"
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_CONTAINERANALYSIS_OCCURRENCES_VIEWER="roles/containeranalysis.occurrences.viewer"
  readonly RBGC_ROLE_CLOUDBUILD_BUILDS_EDITOR="roles/cloudbuild.builds.editor"

  # Common API Base Paths (project-independent)
  readonly RBGC_API_BASE_GCS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}"

  # Cloud Resource Manager - Liens API
  readonly RBGC_API_CRM_LIST_LIENS="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"
  readonly RBGC_API_CRM_DELETE_LIEN="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/liens"

  # Google Cloud Storage (GCS) APIs (project-independent)
  readonly RBGC_API_GCS_BUCKETS="${RBGC_API_BASE_GCS}/b"

  readonly RBGC_BUILD_RUNNER_PLATFORM="linux/amd64"


  # Worker pool infrastructure (dual pools: tether + airgap)
  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_TETHER="-tether"
  readonly RBGC_POOL_SUFFIX_AIRGAP="-airgap"
  readonly RBGC_WORKER_POOL_SUFFIX="-pool"
  readonly RBGC_PATH_WORKER_POOLS="/workerPools"

  readonly ZRBGC_KINDLED=1
}

zrbgc_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBGC_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgc not kindled - call zrbgc_kindle first"
}

# eof

1	//axhob_operation
2	{rbtgo_depot_levy}
3	
4	NOTE: This operation creates an
5	{rbtgi_depot}
6	- a cohesive unit of Recipe Bottle infrastructure including the depot project, build bucket, container repository, Mason service account, and private worker pool
7	that share their productive lifecycle.
8	
9	The
10	{rbtr_payor}
11	creates a new depot infrastructure from the
12	{rbtgi_payor_project}.
13	The operation accepts no CLI parameters; depot identity is read from the kindled regime as `(RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX, RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER)`.
14	
15	//axhos_step
16	. *Authenticate as
17	{rbtr_payor}*:
18	.. Execute
19	{rbtoe_payor_authenticate}
20	
21	//axhos_step
22	. *Validate region against Artifact Registry locations*:
23	.. {rbbc_call}
24	link:https://cloud.google.com/artifact-registry/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations/list[locations.list] for the authenticated project
25	.. {rbbc_require}
26	`{rbrr_gcp_region}` present in the returned location set
27	
28	//axhos_step
29	. *Derive Depot Identity*:
30	.. {rbbc_store}
31	`«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»` as `${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}d-${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}` (resolved by `RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID`)
32	.. {rbbc_store}
33	`«GAR_REPOSITORY»` as `${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}-gar` (resolved by `RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY`)
34	.. {rbbc_store}
35	`«WORKER_POOL_STEM»` as `${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}-pool` (resolved by `RBDC_GCB_POOL_STEM`)
36	.. {rbbc_store}
37	`«BUILD_BUCKET»` as `${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}b-${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}` (resolved by `RBDC_GCS_BUCKET`)
38	.. NOTE: Joint length `${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}` + `d-` + `${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}` ≤ 30 chars (GCP project ID limit) is enforced upstream by `zrbrr_enforce` at regime kindle time, so this step performs no length validation.
39	
40	//axhos_step
41	. *Create Depot Project*:
42	.. {rbbc_submit}
43	link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/create[projects.create] with:
44	... projectId: `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
45	... displayName: `RB Depot: «RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»`
46	... parent: `{rbrp_parent_type}s/{rbrp_parent_id}` (if parent_type != `none`)
47	.. {rbbc_await}
48	returned operation
49	.. {rbbc_require}
50	project creation successful
51	.. NOTE: Project name collision against the GCP soft-delete graveyard surfaces here as fatal — re-using a moniker after `{rbtgo_depot_unmake}` requires waiting out the 30-day retention window. The operator-visible "fails if exists" property is intentional under the (CLOUD_PREFIX, MONIKER) shape.
52	
53	//axhos_step
54	. *Link Billing Account*:
55	.. {rbbc_call}
56	link:https://cloud.google.com/billing/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects/updateBillingInfo[cloudbilling.projects.updateBillingInfo] for `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
57	.. Set billingAccountName: `billingAccounts/{rbrp_billing_account_id}`
58	.. {rbbc_require}
59	HTTP 200 response confirming billing linkage
60	
61	//axhos_step
62	. *Get Depot Project Number*:
63	.. {rbbc_call}
64	link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/get[projects.get] for `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
65	.. {rbbc_store}
66	`«PROJECT_NUMBER»` from `.name` field (CRM v3 returns `projects/{number}`)
67	.. {rbbc_require}
68	valid numeric project number after extracting from name
69	
70	//axhos_step
71	. *Enable Depot Project APIs*:
72	.. For each service in [`artifactregistry`, `cloudbuild`, `containeranalysis`, `iam`, `serviceusage`, `storage`]:
73	... Execute
74	{rbtoe_api_enable}
75	with service name and `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
76	.. {rbbc_require}
77	all APIs enabled successfully
78	
79	//axhos_step
80	. *Create Private Worker Pool*:
81	.. {rbbc_call}
82	link:https://cloud.google.com/build/docs/api/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.workerPools/create[workerPools.create] with:
83	... parent: `projects/«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»/locations/{rbrr_gcp_region}`
84	... workerPoolId: `«WORKER_POOL_STEM»`
85	... body:
86	+
87	----
88	{
89	  "privatePoolV1Config": {
90	    "workerConfig": {
91	      "machineType": "«RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE»"
92	    }
93	  }
94	}
95	----
96	.. NOTE:
97	{rbrr_gcb_machine_type}
98	is a Compute Engine machine type (e.g., `e2-standard-2`), consumed at pool creation time.
99	Pool scales to zero workers when idle — no idle cost accrues.
100	.. Treat HTTP 409 CONFLICT as success (pool already exists — idempotent)
101	
102	//axhos_step
103	. *Verify IAM Propagation*:
104	.. NOTE: After API enablement, IAM permissions may not be immediately available due to eventual consistency.
105	.. {rbbc_poll}
106	link:https://cloud.google.com/artifact-registry/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.repositories/list[artifactregistry.repositories.list] for `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»` in `{rbrr_gcp_region}`
107	.. Poll at `RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC` intervals until HTTP 200 or `RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC` timeout
108	.. {rbbc_require}
109	HTTP 200 response confirming IAM propagation complete
110	.. {rbbc_fatal}
111	if timeout: "IAM propagation timeout - artifactregistry API not accessible"
112	
113	//axhos_step
114	. *Create Build Bucket*:
115	.. {rbbc_call}
116	link:https://cloud.google.com/storage/docs/json_api/v1/buckets/insert[storage.buckets.insert] with:
117	... name: `«BUILD_BUCKET»`
118	... location: `{rbrr_gcp_region}`
119	... project: `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
120	... lifecycle rule: delete objects after 1 day
121	
122	//axhos_step
123	. *Create Container Repository*:
124	.. {rbbc_submit}
125	link:https://cloud.google.com/artifact-registry/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.repositories/create[artifactregistry.repositories.create] with:
126	... repositoryId: `«GAR_REPOSITORY»`
127	... format: `DOCKER`
128	... location: `{rbrr_gcp_region}`
129	... parent: `projects/«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»/locations/{rbrr_gcp_region}`
130	.. {rbbc_await}
131	returned operation
132	
133	//axhos_step
134	. *Create
135	{rbtr_mason}
136	Service Account*:
137	.. NOTE: The
138	{rbtr_mason}
139	replaces Cloud Build's implicit service account to provide deterministic permissions and predictable authorization within the depot infrastructure.
140	.. {rbbc_call}
141	link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/create[iam.serviceAccounts.create] with:
142	... accountId: `mason-«RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»`
143	... displayName: `Mason for RB Depot: «RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»`
144	... project: `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
145	.. {rbbc_store}
146	`«MASON_EMAIL»` from response `.email` field
147	
148	//axhos_step
149	. *Configure
150	{rbtr_mason}
151	Permissions*:
152	.. {rbtoe_iam_grant_repo} on `«GAR_REPOSITORY»`
153	... Add `serviceAccount:«MASON_EMAIL»` with `roles/artifactregistry.writer`
154	.. {rbtoe_iam_grant_bucket} on `«BUILD_BUCKET»`
155	... Add `serviceAccount:«MASON_EMAIL»` with `roles/storage.objectViewer`
156	.. {rbtoe_iam_grant_project} on `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
157	... Add `serviceAccount:«MASON_EMAIL»` with `roles/viewer`
158	... Add `serviceAccount:«MASON_EMAIL»` with `roles/logging.logWriter`
159	
160	//axhos_step
161	. *Enable Cloud Build service agent to impersonate
162	{rbtr_mason}*:
163	.. {rbtoe_iam_grant_sa} on `«MASON_EMAIL»`
164	.. Add member: `serviceAccount:service-«PROJECT_NUMBER»@gcp-sa-cloudbuild.iam.gserviceaccount.com`
165	.. Grant role: `roles/iam.serviceAccountTokenCreator`
166	.. NOTE: Cloud Build service agent is Google-provisioned (auto-created when Cloud Build API is enabled), not a user-created service account. The `tokenCreator` role enables build steps running as {rbtr_mason} (via the build JSON's `serviceAccount` field) to generate fresh access tokens for GCP API calls — required for GAR authentication (docker login, crane push). This is distinct from `serviceAccountUser` (actAs), which the {rbtr_director} holds on {rbtr_mason} for submitting builds.
167	.. {rbbc_require}
168	IAM binding successful
169	
170	//axhoot_typed_output
171	{rbtgi_depot}
172	. *Confirm Depot Creation*:
173	.. {rbbc_show}
174	single-line success banner naming `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»` and the
175	{rbtgo_governor_mantle}
176	follow-up hint
177	
178	//axhoot_typed_output
179	{rbtgi_depot}
180	. *Update Depot Tracking*:
181	.. Execute
182	{rbtoe_depot_list_update}
183	to refresh per-moniker depot fact files
184	
185	//axhoc_completion
186	Successful execution creates depot infrastructure with configured build bucket, container repository, Mason service account, and private worker pool — all derived from `(RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX, RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER)`.
187	Proceed to
188	{rbtgo_governor_mantle}
189	to create the
190	{rbtr_governor}
191	for this depot.
192

lastPrompt: proceed.  Try to use sonnet agents in parallel to do the work, and check it after, for speed.

content.content:
1	//axhob_operation
2	{rbtgo_governor_mantle}
3	
4	NOTE: This operation creates or replaces a
5	{rbtr_governor}
6	within a
7	{rbtgi_depot}.
8	If a
9	{rbtr_governor}
10	already exists, it is deleted and replaced with a fresh one.
11	This enables credential rotation and recovery from compromised keys.
12	
13	The
14	{rbtr_payor}
15	resets the
16	{rbtr_governor}
17	{giam_service_account}
18	for a specified
19	{rbtgi_depot_project}:
20	
21	//axhopt_typed_parameter
22	{rbtgi_depot_project}
23	. *Validate Input Parameters*:
24	.. {rbbc_store}
25	`«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»` as `${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}d-${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}` (resolved by `RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID`)
26	.. NOTE: Format and joint length of `${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}` + `d-` + `${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}` are enforced upstream by `zrbrr_enforce` at regime kindle time, so this step performs no shape validation.
27	
28	//axhos_step
29	. *Authenticate as
30	{rbtr_payor}*:
31	.. Execute
32	{rbtoe_payor_authenticate}
33	
34	//axhos_step
35	. *Depot Project Validation*:
36	.. {rbbc_call}
37	link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/get[projects.get] to verify
38	`«INPUT_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
39	exists and is ACTIVE
40	.. {rbbc_require}
41	`«INPUT_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
42	!=
43	{rbrp_payor_project_id}
44	
45	//axhos_step
46	. *Find and Delete Existing
47	{rbtr_governor}
48	Service Accounts*:
49	.. {rbbc_call}
50	link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/list[iam.serviceAccounts.list]
51	for
52	`«INPUT_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
53	.. {rbbc_store}
54	`«EXISTING_GOVERNORS»` as service accounts matching pattern `governor-*`
55	.. For each service account in `«EXISTING_GOVERNORS»`:
56	... {rbbc_call}
57	link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/delete[iam.serviceAccounts.delete]
58	to remove the service account
59	... {rbbc_require}
60	deletion successful (HTTP 200) or already deleted (HTTP 404)
61	.. {rbbc_show}
62	count of deleted governor service accounts
63	
64	//axhos_step
65	. *Generate Governor Timestamp*:
66	.. {rbbc_store}
67	`«TIMESTAMP»` as current time in YYYYMMDDHHmm format
68	.. {rbbc_store}
69	`«GOVERNOR_ACCOUNT_ID»` as `governor-«TIMESTAMP»`
70	
71	//axhos_step
72	. *Create the
73	{rbtr_governor}
74	{giam_service_account}*:
75	.. {rbbc_call}
76	link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/create[iam.serviceAccounts.create]
77	to create service account in
78	`«INPUT_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
79	.. Set `accountId` to `«GOVERNOR_ACCOUNT_ID»`
80	.. Use display name: `Governor for RB Depot`
81	.. {rbbc_store}
82	`«GOVERNOR_SERVICE_ACCOUNT»` from response `.email` field
83	.. {rbbc_require}
84	service account creation successful (HTTP 200)
85	
86	//axhos_step
87	. *Verify
88	{giam_service_account}
89	Propagation*:
90	.. {rbbc_call}
91	link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/get[iam.serviceAccounts.get]
92	to query service account using
93	`«GOVERNOR_SERVICE_ACCOUNT»`
94	.. {rbbc_poll}
95	with 3-5 second intervals for up to 30 seconds if service account not immediately available
96	.. {rbbc_require}
97	service account accessible before proceeding
98	
99	//axhos_step
100	. *Grant
101	{gcp_project_id}
102	-level Permissions*:
103	.. {rbtoe_iam_grant_project}
104	to update IAM policy on
105	`«INPUT_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
106	.. {rbbc_use}
107	`«GOVERNOR_SERVICE_ACCOUNT»` as principal
108	.. Add role: `roles/owner` (excluding billing permissions maintained by
109	{rbtr_payor})
110	// roles/cloudbuild.connectionViewer eliminated (₣Av) — CB v2 connections no longer used
111	.. Set policy version: 3 for conditional binding support
112	.. {rbbc_require}
113	IAM policy update successful
114	
115	//axhos_step
116	. *Generate
117	{rbtgi_rbra_file}*:
118	.. {rbbc_call}
119	link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts.keys/create[serviceAccounts.keys.create]
120	to create service account key for
121	`«GOVERNOR_SERVICE_ACCOUNT»`
122	.. Set keyAlgorithm: `KEY_ALG_RSA_2048`, privateKeyType: `TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE`
123	.. Retry up to `RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX` times on HTTP 404 with `RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC` delay between attempts
124	.. NOTE: SA read operations (GET by email, keys.list) may succeed while keys.create POST returns 404 "does not exist" due to write-path propagation delay. Google link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/service-accounts-create[documents]: "you might need to wait 60 seconds or more before you use the service account." The 404 confirms no key was created, making retry safe. See <<rbscig_iam_grant_contracts>>.
125	.. {rbbc_store}

1	//axhob_operation
2	{rbtgo_depot_list}
3	
4	The
5	{rbtr_payor}
6	lists all
7	{rbtgi_depot}
8	instances billed to the
9	{rbtr_payor}
10	account and their status:
11	
12	//axhos_step
13	. *Authenticate as
14	{rbtr_payor}*:
15	.. Execute
16	{rbtoe_payor_authenticate}
17	
18	//axhos_step
19	. *Enumerate billing-account projects*:
20	.. {rbbc_call}
21	link:https://cloud.google.com/billing/reference/rest/v1/billingAccounts.projects/list[billingAccounts.projects.list]
22	for `billingAccounts/${RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID}/projects`
23	.. {rbbc_store}
24	`«BILLED_PROJECTS»` — projects with `billingEnabled=true`
25	
26	//axhos_step
27	. *Classify each project as a depot*:
28	.. For each project in `«BILLED_PROJECTS»`:
29	... {rbbc_call}
30	link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/list[projects.serviceAccounts.list]
31	for the project's IAM service accounts
32	... Inspect service account emails for a match against
33	`mason-«MONIKER»@<project>.iam.gserviceaccount.com`
34	where `«MONIKER»` matches `^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$`
35	... Skip projects with no matching Mason service account
36	... {rbbc_store}
37	`«MONIKER»` by stripping the `mason-` prefix from the matched SA's local-part
38	
39	//axhos_step
40	. *Look up lifecycle state for each depot project*:
41	.. {rbbc_call}
42	link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/get[projects.get]
43	for each Mason-SA-bearing project via CRM v1 `projects/${project_id}`
44	.. Classify state:
45	... `lifecycleState=ACTIVE` → `COMPLETE`
46	... `lifecycleState=DELETE_REQUESTED` → `DELETE_REQUESTED`
47	... Other lifecycle states → log and skip
48	
49	//axhos_step
50	. *Emit per-moniker fact files*:
51	.. {rbbc_store}
52	state string to `«MONIKER».depot`
53	(extension constant `RBGP_FACT_EXT_DEPOT`)
54	.. {rbbc_store}
55	canonical project_id to `«MONIKER».depot-project`
56	(extension constant `RBGP_FACT_EXT_DEPOT_PROJECT`)
57	
58	//axhoot_typed_output
59	{rbtgi_depot}
60	. *Display summary*:
61	.. {rbbc_show}
62	each depot moniker with state (`COMPLETE` or `DELETE_REQUESTED`)
63	.. {rbbc_show}
64	total depot count
65	
66	//axhoc_completion
67	Successful execution lists all depots billed to the
68	{rbtr_payor}
69	account.

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.

# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle GCP Payor - Billing and Destructive Operations CLI

set -euo pipefail

source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buc_command.sh"

zrbgp_furnish() {
  buc_doc_env "BURD_BUK_DIR          " "BUK module directory (dispatch-provided)"
  buc_doc_env "BURD_TOOLS_DIR        " "Project tools root directory (dispatch-provided)"
  buc_doc_env_done || return 0

  local -r z_command="${1:-}"

  source "${BURD_CONFIG_DIR}/rbbc_constants.sh"
  local z_rbk_kit_dir="${BURD_TOOLS_DIR}/${RBBC_kit_subdir}"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/burd_regime.sh"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buv_validation.sh"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buym_yelp.sh"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buh_handbook.sh"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buf_fact.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgc_Constants.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbcc_Constants.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbrr_regime.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbdc_DerivedConstants.sh"
  source "${RBBC_rbrr_file}"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgo_OAuth.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgu_Utility.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgi_IAM.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbrp_regime.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbgp_Payor.sh"
  source "${BURD_BUK_DIR}/buz_zipper.sh"
  source "${z_rbk_kit_dir}/rbz_zipper.sh"

  buc_log_args 'Initialize modules'
  zbuv_kindle
  zburd_kindle
  zrbcc_kindle

  zrbrr_kindle
  if test "${z_command}" != "rbgp_depot_list"; then
    zrbrr_enforce
  fi
  zrbdc_kindle

  zrbgc_kindle

  source "${RBBC_rbrp_file}" || buc_die "Failed to source RBRP: ${RBBC_rbrp_file}"
  zrbrp_kindle
  zrbrp_enforce

  zrbgo_kindle
  zrbgu_kindle
  zrbgi_kindle
  zrbgp_kindle

  zbuz_kindle
  zrbz_kindle
}

buc_execute rbgp_ "Recipe Bottle Payor" zrbgp_furnish "$@"

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection

ZRBGG_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbgg_*)

zrbgg_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBGG_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgg already kindled"

  test -n "${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID:-}"     || buc_die "RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID is not set"

  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE="project_state"
  readonly ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_RESTORE="project_restore"

}

zrbgg_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBGG_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgg not kindled - call zrbgg_kindle first"

zrbgg_create_service_account_with_key() {
  zrbgg_sentinel

  local z_account_name="$1"
  local z_display_name="$2"
  local z_description="$3"
  local z_role="$4"

  local z_account_email="${z_account_name}@${RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL}"

  buc_step 'Get OAuth token from admin'
  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"

  buc_step "Create request JSON for ${z_account_name}"
  jq -n                                      \
    --arg account_id "${z_account_name}"     \
    --arg display_name "${z_display_name}"   \
    --arg description "${z_description}"     \
    '{
      accountId: $account_id,
      serviceAccount: {
        displayName: $display_name,
        description: $description
      }
    }' > "${ZRBGG_PREFIX}create_request.json" || buc_die "Failed to create request JSON"

  buc_step 'Create service account via REST API'
  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}" "${z_token}" \
    "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}" "${ZRBGG_PREFIX}create_request.json"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "Create service account" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}"

  local z_sa_uid
  z_sa_uid=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_CREATE}" '.uniqueId') \
    || buc_die "Failed to get uniqueId from SA creation response"
  buc_info "Service account created: ${z_account_email} (uid: ${z_sa_uid})"

  rbgu_poll_until_ok "SA propagation (by email)" \
    "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_VERIFY}"

  buc_step 'Preflight: ensure no existing USER_MANAGED keys (manual cleanup path)'

  buc_log_args 'List keys'
  rbgu_http_json "GET"                                                        \
    "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}${RBGC_PATH_KEYS}"        \
                                      "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS}"
  rbgu_http_require_ok "List service account keys" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS}"

  buc_log_args 'Count existing user-managed keys'
  local z_user_keys
  z_user_keys=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_LIST_KEYS}" \
                 '[.keys[]? | select(.keyType=="USER_MANAGED")] | length') \
    || buc_die "Failed to parse service account keys"

  if test "${z_user_keys}" -gt 0; then
    buc_log_args 'Provide a console URL to delete keys manually, then rerun this command'
    local z_sa_email_enc="${z_account_email//@/%40}"
    local z_keys_url="${RBGC_CONSOLE_URL}iam-admin/serviceaccounts/details/${z_sa_email_enc}?project=${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"

    buc_warn "Found ${z_user_keys} existing USER_MANAGED key(s) on ${z_account_email}."
    buc_info "Open Console, select the **Keys** tab, delete old keys, then rerun:"
    buc_info "  ${z_keys_url}"
    buc_die  "Aborting to avoid minting additional keys."
  fi

  buc_step 'Generate service account key (with propagation retry)'
  local z_key_req="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_key_request.json"
  printf '%s' '{"privateKeyType": "TYPE_GOOGLE_CREDENTIALS_FILE"}' > "${z_key_req}"

  local z_key_attempt=0
  local z_key_infix=""
  local z_key_code=""
  while :; do
    z_key_attempt=$((z_key_attempt + 1))
    z_key_infix="${ZRBGG_INFIX_KEY}-attempt${z_key_attempt}"
    rbgu_http_json "POST" "${RBGD_API_SERVICE_ACCOUNTS}/${z_account_email}${RBGC_PATH_KEYS}" \
                                           "${z_token}" "${z_key_infix}" "${z_key_req}"

    z_key_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_key_infix}") || z_key_code=""

    if test "${z_key_code}" = "200"; then
      break
    fi

    if test "${z_key_code}" = "404" && test "${z_key_attempt}" -lt "${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX}"; then
      buc_warn "keys.create returned 404 (SA write-path propagation delay), retry ${z_key_attempt}/${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_MAX} in ${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC}s..."
      sleep "${RBGC_SA_KEY_CREATE_RETRY_DELAY_SEC}"
      continue
    fi

    rbgu_http_require_ok "Generate service account key" "${z_key_infix}"
  done

  buc_step 'Extract and decode key data'
  local z_key_b64
  z_key_b64=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_key_infix}" '.privateKeyData') \
    || buc_die "Failed to extract privateKeyData"
  # Decode into the assay subdirectory (RBRR_SECRETS_DIR/assay/) so the
  # only readable form of the private key shares lifecycle and location
  # with the final RBRA file — credentials never leak into BURD_TEMP_DIR.
  local -r z_assay_dir="${RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE%/*}"
  local -r z_key_json="${z_assay_dir}/_decoded_key_${z_account_name}.json"
  printf '%s' "${z_key_b64}" | openssl enc -base64 -d -A > "${z_key_json}" \
    || buc_die "Failed to decode key data"

  buc_step 'Convert JSON key to RBRA format'
  local z_rbra_file="${RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE}"

  local z_client_email
  z_client_email=$(zrbgg_secrets_json_field_capture "${z_key_json}" '.client_email') \
    || buc_die "Failed to extract client_email from key JSON"

  local z_private_key
  z_private_key=$(zrbgg_secrets_json_field_capture "${z_key_json}" '.private_key') \
    || buc_die "Failed to extract private_key from key JSON"

  local z_project_id
  z_project_id=$(zrbgg_secrets_json_field_capture "${z_key_json}" '.project_id') \
    || buc_die "Failed to extract project_id from key JSON"

  buc_step 'Write RBRA file' "${z_rbra_file}"
  {
    printf 'RBRA_ROLE=%s\n'                  "${z_role}"
    printf 'RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL="%s"\n'      "$z_client_email"
    printf 'RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY="'; printf '%s' "$z_private_key"; printf '"\n'
    printf 'RBRA_PROJECT_ID="%s"\n'        "$z_project_id"
    printf 'RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC=1800\n'
  } > "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_file}"

  test -f "${z_rbra_file}" || buc_die "Failed to write RBRA file ${z_rbra_file}"

  # Decoded JSON lives in RBRR_SECRETS_DIR (not BURD_TEMP_DIR), so
  # BCG:518's no-module-temp-deletion rule does not bind. Remove now
  # that the bytes are persisted in RBRA form.
  rm -f "${z_key_json}"

  buc_info "RBRA file written: ${z_rbra_file}"

  # Echo uniqueId to stdout for callers (all logging goes to stderr per BCG)
  printf '%s' "${z_sa_uid}"
}

zrbgg_create_gcs_bucket() {
  zrbgg_sentinel

  local z_token="${1}"
  local z_bucket_name="${2}"

  buc_log_args 'Create bucket request JSON for '"${z_bucket_name}"
  local z_bucket_req="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgg_bucket_create_req.json"
  jq -n --arg name "${z_bucket_name}" --arg location "${RBGC_GAR_LOCATION}" '
{
  name: $name,
  location: $location,
  storageClass: "STANDARD",
  lifecycle: { rule: [ { action: { type: "Delete" }, condition: { age: 1 } } ] }
}' > "${z_bucket_req}" || buc_die "Failed to create bucket request JSON"

  buc_log_args 'Send bucket creation request'
  local z_code
  local z_err
  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${RBGD_API_GCS_BUCKET_CREATE}" "${z_token}" \
                                  "${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE}" "${z_bucket_req}"
  z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE}") || buc_die "Bad bucket creation HTTP code"
  z_err=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_CREATE}" '.error.message') || z_err="HTTP ${z_code}"

  case "${z_code}" in
    200|201) buc_info "Bucket ${z_bucket_name} created";                    return 0 ;;
    409)     buc_die  "Bucket ${z_bucket_name} already exists (pristine-state violation)" ;;
    *)       buc_die  "Failed to create bucket: ${z_err}"                             ;;
  esac
}

zrbgg_list_bucket_objects_capture() {
  zrbgg_sentinel

  local z_token="${1}"
  local z_bucket_name="${2}"

  local z_list_url_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_STORAGE}${RBGC_STORAGE_JSON_V1}/b/${z_bucket_name}/o"
  local z_page_token=""
  local z_first=1

  while :; do
    buc_log_args "Build URL with optional pageToken -> ${z_first}"
    local z_url="${z_list_url_base}"
    if test -n "${z_page_token}"; then
      buc_log_args 'pageToken must be URL-encoded'
      local z_tok_enc
      z_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_page_token}") || return 1
      z_url="${z_url}?pageToken=${z_tok_enc}"
    fi

    buc_log_args 'Use a unique infix per page to avoid clobbering files'
    local z_infix="${ZRBGG_INFIX_BUCKET_LIST}${z_first}"
    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_infix}"

    local z_code
    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_infix}") || return 1
    test "${z_code}" = "200" || return 1

    buc_log_args 'Print names from this page (if any)'
    buc_log_args 'Next page?'
    jq -r                '.items[]?.name // empty' "${ZRBGU_PREFIX}${z_infix}${ZRBGU_POSTFIX_JSON}"  || return 1
    z_page_token=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_infix}" '.nextPageToken') || z_page_token=""

    test -n "${z_page_token}" || break
    z_first=$((z_first + 1))
  done
}

  zrbgg_sentinel

  local z_identity="${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"

  buc_doc_brief "Invest a Retriever service account for an identity"
  buc_doc_param "identity" "Identity (required) — composes ${RBCC_role_retriever}-<identity>"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  test -n "${z_identity}" || buc_die "Identity required"

  local z_account_name="${RBCC_role_retriever}-${z_identity}"
  local z_account_email="${z_account_name}@${RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL}"

  buc_step "Investing Retriever service account: ${z_account_name}"

  zrbgg_create_service_account_with_key                                          \
    "${z_account_name}"                                                        \
    "Recipe Bottle Retriever (${z_identity})"                                  \
    "Read-only access to Google Artifact Registry - identity: ${z_identity}"   \
    "${RBCC_role_retriever}" > /dev/null || buc_die "Failed to create Retriever SA"

  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"

  buc_step 'Adding Artifact Registry Reader role'
  rbgi_add_project_iam_role                 \
    "${z_token}"                            \
    "Grant Artifact Registry Reader"        \
    "${RBGD_PROJECT_RESOURCE}"              \
    "${RBGC_ROLE_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_READER}"  \
    "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}"     \
    "retriever-reader"

  buc_step 'Adding Container Analysis Occurrences Viewer role'
  rbgi_add_project_iam_role                              \
    "${z_token}"                                         \
    "Grant Container Analysis Occurrences Viewer"        \
    "${RBGD_PROJECT_RESOURCE}"                           \
    "${RBGC_ROLE_CONTAINERANALYSIS_OCCURRENCES_VIEWER}"  \
    "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}"                  \
    "retriever-analysis"

  buc_info "RBRA file written: ${RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE}"
  buc_info ""
  buc_info "Install:"
  buc_bare "        cp ${RBDC_ASSAY_RBRA_FILE} ${RBDC_RETRIEVER_RBRA_FILE}"
}

rbgg_invest_director() {
  zrbgg_sentinel

  local z_identity="${BUZ_FOLIO:-}"

  buc_doc_brief "Invest a Director service account for an identity"
  buc_doc_param "identity" "Identity (required) — composes ${RBCC_role_director}-<identity>"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  test -n "${z_identity}" || buc_die "Identity required"

  local z_account_name="${RBCC_role_director}-${z_identity}"
  local z_account_email="${z_account_name}@${RBGD_SA_EMAIL_FULL}"

  buc_step "Investing Director service account: ${z_account_name}"

  zrbgg_create_service_account_with_key                      \
    "${z_account_name}"                                    \

input.prompt:
You are implementing pace ₢BBAAm of heat ₣BB (rbk-mvp-3-release-qualification). Repo: /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster

## Background

The depot enumeration backend uses Cloud Billing v1 `billingAccounts.projects.list` followed by a Mason-SA presence gate (loop scanning project SAs for `mason-<moniker>@...`). This is **blind to DELETE_REQUESTED projects** because billing is unlinked at unmake time before soft-delete, so they vanish from the billing-account project list. This in turn breaks the canonical-establish fixture's auto-pick: it picks a moniker that collides with a soft-deleted projectId from a prior failed run.

Also: 30-day soft-delete retention means even if listed, you can't reuse the projectId. Burn-the-bridges: operator deletes all current depots before this lands; no transitional dual-search code.

## Files in scope (you OWN these)

- `Tools/rbk/rbgc_Constants.sh`
- `Tools/rbk/rbgp_Payor.sh`
- `Tools/rbk/rbgp_cli.sh`

Other agents are working in parallel on:
- Rust crate `Tools/rbk/rbtd/src/rbtdrk_canonical.rs` (family stem bump) — DO NOT TOUCH
- Specs `Tools/rbk/vov_veiled/RBSDE-*.adoc`, `RBSGM-*.adoc`, `RBSDL-*.adoc` — DO NOT TOUCH

## Required changes

### 1. `rbgc_Constants.sh` — add displayName anchor constant

Inside `zrbgc_kindle()`, near the other depot-related constants (e.g., near `RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_COMPLETE` around line 153), add:

```bash
  # DisplayName anchor used across depot-creation sites (depot project,
  # Mason SA, Governor SA). Search backend filters CRM v3 projects:search
  # by displayName starting with this anchor. Distinct, unmistakable string
  # ensures no collision with non-depot projects in the operator's account.
  readonly RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX="RBGC_DEPOT_COMMON"
```

### 2. `rbgp_Payor.sh` — replace `zrbgp_depot_state_emit`

Current location: lines 143-323. Replace the entire function (and its preceding header comment block) with a CRM v3 `projects:search`-based implementation:

**API endpoint:** `GET ${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects:search?query=<URL-encoded-query>`

**Query string:** `displayName:RBGC_DEPOT_COMMON*` — CRM v3 search treats trailing `*` as prefix wildcard. Use `rbgu_urlencode_capture` to encode.

**Response shape:** `{"projects":[{"name":"projects/<NUMBER>","projectId":"...","displayName":"RBGC_DEPOT_COMMON canest100000","state":"ACTIVE|DELETE_REQUESTED",...}],"nextPageToken":"..."}` — note CRM v3 returns BOTH ACTIVE and DELETE_REQUESTED projects by default (no need to filter on state).

**Per-project processing:**
- Parse `state`: `ACTIVE` → `${RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_COMPLETE}`, `DELETE_REQUESTED` → `${RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_DELETE_REQUESTED}`. Other states: log and skip.
- Parse `displayName`: must start with `${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX} ` (anchor + space). Strip the prefix to get the moniker. If displayName doesn't match the expected format, log and skip (defensive — non-depot projects could in principle match the wildcard).
- Parse `projectId`.
- Validate moniker matches `^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$` (RBRR-canonical shape). Skip if invalid.
- Write `${moniker}.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}` (state) and `${moniker}.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot_project}` (projectId) via `buf_write_fact_multi`.

**Pagination:** loop using `nextPageToken`; URL-encode and append as `&pageToken=<enc>`.

**Remove RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID requirement** — CRM v3 search uses only the OAuth token; no billing account needed for enumeration. (BUT: depot_levy still needs RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID to link billing — leave that check in place at the levy site.)

**Remove Mason-SA gate entirely** — no per-project IAM serviceAccounts.list call. The displayName anchor IS the discriminator.

**Header comment:** rewrite to reflect new mechanism. Mention: CRM v3 projects:search, displayName anchor as discriminator, returns ACTIVE+DELETE_REQUESTED, moniker derived by stripping `${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX} ` prefix from displayName.

### 3. `rbgp_Payor.sh` — update three displayName creation sites

**Depot project create (around line 744):**
```bash
    --arg displayName "${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX} ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}" \
```
(was `"RB Depot ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}"`)

**Mason SA create (around line 902):**
```bash
  local -r z_mason_display_name="${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX} mason ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}"
```
(was `"Mason for RB Depot: ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}"`)

**Governor SA create (around line 1363):**
```bash
    --arg displayName "${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX} governor ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}" \
```
(was `"Governor for RB Depot"` — note current Governor displayName has NO moniker; new one includes moniker for consistency, and using "governor" sub-tag because Governor SAs live in the depot project alongside Mason SAs.)

### 4. `rbgp_cli.sh` — verify exemption still relevant

Line 58 currently has `if test "${z_command}" != "rbgp_depot_list"; then zrbrr_enforce; fi`. This was needed because `rbgp_depot_list` could run before any depot was provisioned. With CRM v3 search this remains correct (no RBRR moniker needed for search). LEAVE this exemption in place.

## Key discipline

- Follow BCG patterns (study existing code in rbgp_Payor.sh: `local -r` constants, `local` for synthesized loop locals, `rbgu_http_json` / `rbgu_http_require_ok` / `rbgu_http_code_capture` / `rbgu_json_field_capture` / `rbgu_urlencode_capture` / `buf_write_fact_multi`).
- All HTTP calls go through `rbgu_http_json` with a unique infix — paginate with per-page infix like `depot_state_search_${z_search_page}`.
- Per-project synthesized locals follow BCG exception 2 (declare outside loop, assign inside).
- Use `${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}` and `${RBCC_fact_ext_depot_project}` extension constants — already in scope.
- Do NOT add features beyond what's listed. No backwards-compatibility shims (burn-the-bridges).
- No comments referencing pace IDs or coronets in the code.
- The function name `zrbgp_depot_state_emit` should stay (callers reference it).
- The function `zrbgp_depot_list_update` (post-lifecycle hook) stays as-is — it just calls `zrbgp_depot_state_emit`.

## Verification before reporting done

1. Run `bash -n Tools/rbk/rbgp_Payor.sh` and `bash -n Tools/rbk/rbgc_Constants.sh` and `bash -n Tools/rbk/rbgp_cli.sh` — all must exit 0.
2. Grep for any remaining references to the old enumeration: `grep -n "billingAccounts.*projects\|RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID.*depot_list\|mason-.*\\\\." Tools/rbk/rbgp_Payor.sh` — should be empty (or only in unrelated billing-attach/detach functions, which are fine).
3. Grep for `displayName` in rbgp_Payor.sh — confirm exactly the three create sites use `${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX}`.

Report back: list of files modified with one-line summary each, plus any decisions you made that diverge from this brief (with rationale).

input.prompt:
You are implementing pace ₢BBAAm of heat ₣BB (rbk-mvp-3-release-qualification). Repo: /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster

## Background

The depot enumeration backend is being switched from Cloud Billing v1 `billingAccounts.projects.list` + Mason-SA presence gate to CRM v3 `projects:search` + displayName anchor. This affects three specs that document the affected operations.

The displayName anchor is a constant `RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX="RBGC_DEPOT_COMMON"` defined in `rbgc_Constants.sh` (other agent is adding this). Three create sites use it:
- Depot project: `displayName = "${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX} ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}"` (e.g., `"RBGC_DEPOT_COMMON canest2100000"`)
- Mason SA: `displayName = "${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX} mason ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}"`
- Governor SA: `displayName = "${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX} governor ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}"`

The search/discrimination side filters CRM v3 search by `displayName:RBGC_DEPOT_COMMON*` and derives the moniker by stripping the `${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX} ` prefix from each project's displayName. Mason-SA gate is removed.

CRM v3 `projects:search` returns BOTH `ACTIVE` and `DELETE_REQUESTED` projects in its default response (no state filter needed) — that is the load-bearing fix: `DELETE_REQUESTED` projects are now visible to the operator and the auto-pick logic.

## Files in scope (you OWN these — and ONLY these)

- `Tools/rbk/vov_veiled/RBSDE-depot_levy.adoc`
- `Tools/rbk/vov_veiled/RBSGM-governor_mantle.adoc`
- `Tools/rbk/vov_veiled/RBSDL-depot_list.adoc`

Other agents are working in parallel on:
- Bash code in `Tools/rbk/rbgc_Constants.sh`, `rbgp_Payor.sh`, `rbgp_cli.sh` — DO NOT TOUCH
- Rust crate `Tools/rbk/rbtd/src/rbtdrk_canonical.rs` — DO NOT TOUCH

## Required changes

### 1. RBSDE-depot_levy.adoc

Find the "Create Depot Project" step (around line 41-51) and the "Create Mason Service Account" step (around line 133-146). Update displayName text to match the new format:

- **Depot project displayName**: was `RB Depot: «RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»`. Change to `«RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX» «RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»` (with anchor + space + moniker). Add a brief sentence noting the anchor is used by `{rbtgo_depot_list}` for CRM v3 search-based depot discrimination.

- **Mason SA displayName**: was `Mason for RB Depot: «RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»`. Change to `«RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX» mason «RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»`.

Keep all other content intact. Don't restructure the document.

### 2. RBSGM-governor_mantle.adoc

Find the "Create the Governor Service Account" step (around line 72-84). Update display name:

- **Governor SA displayName**: was `Governor for RB Depot`. Change to `«RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX» governor «RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»`. (Note: previously had no moniker — new format includes moniker for parity with depot/Mason and to support searchability if ever needed.)

Keep all other content intact.

### 3. RBSDL-depot_list.adoc — substantial rewrite

This spec needs the most change. Current shape (lines 1-69):
- Step "Enumerate billing-account projects" (calls `billingAccounts.projects.list`)
- Step "Classify each project as a depot" (Mason-SA presence gate)
- Step "Look up lifecycle state for each depot project" (CRM v1 projects.get)
- Step "Emit per-moniker fact files"

Replace with this shape:

- Step "Authenticate as Payor" (unchanged)
- Step "Search depots by displayName anchor":
  - Call `cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com/v3/projects:search` with `query=displayName:«RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX»*` (link to https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/search)
  - Note that CRM v3 search returns both `ACTIVE` and `DELETE_REQUESTED` projects in the default response
  - Note pagination via `nextPageToken`
- Step "Derive moniker and state per result":
  - For each project in the response: store `«MONIKER»` by stripping the `«RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX» ` prefix from `displayName`; require `«MONIKER»` matches `^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$` (else log and skip — defensive against non-depot displayName matches); classify state ACTIVE → `COMPLETE`, DELETE_REQUESTED → `DELETE_REQUESTED`, other → log and skip.
- Step "Emit per-moniker fact files" (unchanged from current — keep both `«MONIKER».depot` and `«MONIKER».depot-project`)
- Output and completion sections: keep the per-moniker summary display.

Add a note explaining the `DELETE_REQUESTED` visibility property — operator can now see ghost depots (soft-deleted projects in their 30-day retention window) alongside active ones. This is load-bearing for the canonical-establish fixture's auto-pick logic.

Drop all references to:
- `RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID` (no longer required for depot_list)
- `billingAccounts.projects.list` and Cloud Billing v1
- Mason-SA presence gate / `iam.serviceAccounts.list`
- CRM v1 `projects.get` (per-project lifecycle lookup is no longer needed — state comes back in the search response)

## Discipline

- Maintain existing AsciiDoc/MCM patterns: `{rbtgo_depot_list}`, `{rbtr_payor}`, `{rbbc_call}`, `{rbbc_store}`, `{rbbc_require}`, `{rbbc_show}`, etc. Don't invent new attribute references — reuse what's there.
- The `«VARIABLE»` notation in the spec is the standard way to express bound values. Use it for `«RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX»`, `«MONIKER»`, `«RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»`, etc.
- Section headers use `//axhob_operation`, `//axhos_step`, `//axhoot_typed_output`, `//axhoc_completion` — preserve these.
- Don't add MCM linked-term definitions unless you're sure the term doesn't already exist in the file family.
- Keep the file lengths roughly proportional to current — no need to expand wildly.
- No emojis.

You are implementing pace ₢BBAAm of heat ₣BB (rbk-mvp-3-release-qualification). Repo: /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster

## Background

The depot enumeration backend is being switched from Cloud Billing v1 `billingAccounts.projects.list` + Mason-SA presence gate to CRM v3 `projects:search` + displayName anchor. This affects three specs that document the affected operations.

The displayName anchor is a constant `RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX="RBGC_DEPOT_COMMON"` defined in `rbgc_Constants.sh` (other agent is adding this). Three create sites use it:
- Depot project: `displayName = "${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX} ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}"` (e.g., `"RBGC_DEPOT_COMMON canest2100000"`)
- Mason SA: `displayName = "${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX} mason ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}"`
- Governor SA: `displayName = "${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX} governor ${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}"`

The search/discrimination side filters CRM v3 search by `displayName:RBGC_DEPOT_COMMON*` and derives the moniker by stripping the `${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX} ` prefix from each project's displayName. Mason-SA gate is removed.

CRM v3 `projects:search` returns BOTH `ACTIVE` and `DELETE_REQUESTED` projects in its default response (no state filter needed) — that is the load-bearing fix: `DELETE_REQUESTED` projects are now visible to the operator and the auto-pick logic.

## Files in scope (you OWN these — and ONLY these)

- `Tools/rbk/vov_veiled/RBSDE-depot_levy.adoc`
- `Tools/rbk/vov_veiled/RBSGM-governor_mantle.adoc`
- `Tools/rbk/vov_veiled/RBSDL-depot_list.adoc`

Other agents are working in parallel on:
- Bash code in `Tools/rbk/rbgc_Constants.sh`, `rbgp_Payor.sh`, `rbgp_cli.sh` — DO NOT TOUCH
- Rust crate `Tools/rbk/rbtd/src/rbtdrk_canonical.rs` — DO NOT TOUCH

## Required changes

### 1. RBSDE-depot_levy.adoc

Find the "Create Depot Project" step (around line 41-51) and the "Create Mason Service Account" step (around line 133-146). Update displayName text to match the new format:

- **Depot project displayName**: was `RB Depot: «RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»`. Change to `«RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX» «RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»` (with anchor + space + moniker). Add a brief sentence noting the anchor is used by `{rbtgo_depot_list}` for CRM v3 search-based depot discrimination.

- **Mason SA displayName**: was `Mason for RB Depot: «RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»`. Change to `«RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX» mason «RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»`.

Keep all other content intact. Don't restructure the document.

### 2. RBSGM-governor_mantle.adoc

Find the "Create the Governor Service Account" step (around line 72-84). Update display name:

- **Governor SA displayName**: was `Governor for RB Depot`. Change to `«RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX» governor «RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»`. (Note: previously had no moniker — new format includes moniker for parity with depot/Mason and to support searchability if ever needed.)

Keep all other content intact.

### 3. RBSDL-depot_list.adoc — substantial rewrite

This spec needs the most change. Current shape (lines 1-69):
- Step "Enumerate billing-account projects" (calls `billingAccounts.projects.list`)
- Step "Classify each project as a depot" (Mason-SA presence gate)
- Step "Look up lifecycle state for each depot project" (CRM v1 projects.get)
- Step "Emit per-moniker fact files"

Replace with this shape:

- Step "Authenticate as Payor" (unchanged)
- Step "Search depots by displayName anchor":
  - Call `cloudresourcemanager.googleapis.com/v3/projects:search` with `query=displayName:«RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX»*` (link to https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/search)
  - Note that CRM v3 search returns both `ACTIVE` and `DELETE_REQUESTED` projects in the default response
  - Note pagination via `nextPageToken`
- Step "Derive moniker and state per result":
  - For each project in the response: store `«MONIKER»` by stripping the `«RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX» ` prefix from `displayName`; require `«MONIKER»` matches `^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$` (else log and skip — defensive against non-depot displayName matches); classify state ACTIVE → `COMPLETE`, DELETE_REQUESTED → `DELETE_REQUESTED`, other → log and skip.
- Step "Emit per-moniker fact files" (unchanged from current — keep both `«MONIKER».depot` and `«MONIKER».depot-project`)
- Output and completion sections: keep the per-moniker summary display.

Add a note explaining the `DELETE_REQUESTED` visibility property — operator can now see ghost depots (soft-deleted projects in their 30-day retention window) alongside active ones. This is load-bearing for the canonical-establish fixture's auto-pick logic.

Drop all references to:
- `RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID` (no longer required for depot_list)
- `billingAccounts.projects.list` and Cloud Billing v1
- Mason-SA presence gate / `iam.serviceAccounts.list`
- CRM v1 `projects.get` (per-project lifecycle lookup is no longer needed — state comes back in the search response)

## Discipline

- Maintain existing AsciiDoc/MCM patterns: `{rbtgo_depot_list}`, `{rbtr_payor}`, `{rbbc_call}`, `{rbbc_store}`, `{rbbc_require}`, `{rbbc_show}`, etc. Don't invent new attribute references — reuse what's there.
- The `«VARIABLE»` notation in the spec is the standard way to express bound values. Use it for `«RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX»`, `«MONIKER»`, `«RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»`, etc.
- Section headers use `//axhob_operation`, `//axhos_step`, `//axhoot_typed_output`, `//axhoc_completion` — preserve these.
- Don't add MCM linked-term definitions unless you're sure the term doesn't already exist in the file family.

3. `grep -n "RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX" Tools/rbk/vov_veiled/RBSDE-depot_levy.adoc` — should match in depot project AND Mason create steps.
4. `grep -n "RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX" Tools/rbk/vov_veiled/RBSGM-governor_mantle.adoc` — should match in Governor create step.

**`Tools/rbk/rbgp_Payor.sh`** — Four edits:
1. Replaced the entire `zrbgp_depot_state_emit` function (and its header comment) with a CRM v3 `projects:search`-based implementation: queries `displayName:RBGC_DEPOT_COMMON*`, parses `state` (`ACTIVE`→`COMPLETE`, `DELETE_REQUESTED`→`DELETE_REQUESTED`), derives moniker by stripping the `z_display_prefix` anchor, validates moniker against `^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$`, writes fact files via `buf_write_fact_multi`. This correctly handles both depot projects (single-word moniker) and Mason/Governor SA displayNames (multi-word: `"RBGC_DEPOT_COMMON mason canest100000"`) — for depot projects the first-word extraction gives the correct moniker directly, and Mason/Governor SA displayNames will only appear in `serviceAccounts` contexts, not in `projects:search` results, so no conflict arises.</result>

@@ -141,21 +141,21 @@ zrbgp_authenticate_capture() {
 }

-# Lifecycle is determined first via CRM v1; only ACTIVE and DELETE_REQUESTED
-# projects are candidates for SA-list scanning.  Per-moniker fact files
-# named "<moniker>.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}" (state) and
+# Uses CRM v3 projects:search with displayName anchor as discriminator —
+# query "displayName:RBGC_DEPOT_COMMON*" returns ACTIVE and DELETE_REQUESTED
+# projects together (no billing-account enumeration required).  Moniker is
+# derived by stripping the "${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX} " prefix from each
+# project's displayName.  Per-moniker fact files named
+# "<moniker>.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}" (state) and
 # "<moniker>.${RBCC_fact_ext_depot_project}" (project_id) are written via
 # buf_write_fact_multi; consumers walk the emitted files in BURD_OUTPUT_DIR /
 # BURD_TEMP_DIR (filesystem is the data bus).
 #
-# Mason SA presence IS the discriminator; projects without a Mason SA are
-# silently skipped (no BROKEN state emitted).

+# The displayName anchor is the sole discriminator.  Projects whose
+# displayName does not parse to a valid RBRR-canonical moniker are skipped.
 #
-# Billing v1 projects list and IAM v1 serviceAccounts list are paginated via
-# nextPageToken; per-page infixes keep response files distinct.
+# Paginated via nextPageToken; per-page infixes keep response files distinct.
 #
 # Single-shot per dispatch — buf_write_fact_multi dies on preexist.
 #
@@ -166,159 +166,96 @@ zrbgp_depot_state_emit() {
   local -r z_token="${1:-}"
   test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "zrbgp_depot_state_emit: token required"

-  # operations) but required here to enumerate depot projects.

+  local z_query_enc=""
+  local z_tok_enc=""
+  local z_search_infix=""
   local z_project_count=0

-  local z_global_project_index=0
   local z_project_id=""
-  local z_crm_infix=""
-  local z_crm_code=""
-  local z_lifecycle_state=""
+  local z_display_name=""
+  local z_crm_state=""
   local z_state=""
-  local z_sa_url_base=""
-  local z_sa_url=""
-  local z_sa_page=1
-  local z_sa_page_token=""
-  local z_sa_tok_enc=""
-  local z_sa_infix=""
-  local z_sa_list_code=""
-  local z_sa_count=0
-  local z_sa_index=0
-  local z_sa_email=""
-  local z_mason_email=""
-  local z_mason_local=""
+  local z_moniker_raw=""
   local z_moniker=""
 
+  z_query_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_search_query}") \
+    || buc_die "Failed to URL-encode CRM v3 search query"
+
   while :; do
-    z_billing_url="${z_billing_url_base}"
-    if test -n "${z_billing_page_token}"; then
-      z_billing_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_billing_page_token}") \
-        || buc_die "Failed to URL-encode Billing v1 pageToken"
-      z_billing_url="${z_billing_url}?pageToken=${z_billing_tok_enc}"
+    z_search_url="${z_search_url_base}?query=${z_query_enc}"
+    if test -n "${z_search_page_token}"; then
+      z_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_search_page_token}") \
+        || buc_die "Failed to URL-encode CRM v3 pageToken"
+      z_search_url="${z_search_url}&pageToken=${z_tok_enc}"
     fi
 
-    z_billing_infix="depot_state_billing_${z_billing_page}"
-    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_billing_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_billing_infix}"
-    rbgu_http_require_ok "List billing account projects" "${z_billing_infix}"
+    z_search_infix="depot_state_search_${z_search_page}"
+    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_search_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_search_infix}"
+    rbgu_http_require_ok "CRM v3 projects:search" "${z_search_infix}"

-      z_project_id=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_billing_infix}" ".projectBillingInfo[${z_index}].projectId") \

-
-      # CRM v1 lifecycle lookup gates the SA list — cheaper call, single
-      # classification decision before potentially-failing IAM scan.
-      z_crm_infix="depot_state_crm_${z_global_project_index}"

-
-      z_crm_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_crm_infix}") || z_crm_code=""
-      if test "${z_crm_code}" != "200"; then
-        buc_log_args "Skipping project (CRM lookup HTTP ${z_crm_code}): ${z_project_id}"
-        z_index=$((z_index + 1))
-        z_global_project_index=$((z_global_project_index + 1))
-        continue
-      fi
-
-      z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_crm_infix}" '.lifecycleState') \
-        || z_lifecycle_state=""
+      z_crm_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_search_infix}" ".projects[${z_index}].state") \
+        || { z_index=$((z_index + 1)); continue; }
 
-      if test "${z_lifecycle_state}" = "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
+      if test "${z_crm_state}" = "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
         z_state="${RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_DELETE_REQUESTED}"
-      elif test "${z_lifecycle_state}" = "ACTIVE"; then
+      elif test "${z_crm_state}" = "ACTIVE"; then
         z_state="${RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_COMPLETE}"
       else
-        buc_log_args "Skipping project ${z_project_id} with unrecognized lifecycle state: ${z_lifecycle_state}"
+        buc_log_args "Skipping project with unrecognized state: ${z_crm_state}"
         z_index=$((z_index + 1))
-        z_global_project_index=$((z_global_project_index + 1))
         continue
       fi
 
-      # Scan SA list for a Mason SA — moniker portion anchored to RBRR's
-      # ^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$ shape.  Paginated via nextPageToken; break out on
-      # first hit since the depot's Mason SA is a singleton.
-      z_sa_url_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/${z_project_id}/serviceAccounts"
-      z_sa_page=1
-      z_sa_page_token=""
-      z_mason_email=""
-
-      while :; do
-        z_sa_url="${z_sa_url_base}"
-        if test -n "${z_sa_page_token}"; then
-          z_sa_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_sa_page_token}") \
-            || buc_die "Failed to URL-encode IAM v1 pageToken"
-          z_sa_url="${z_sa_url}?pageToken=${z_sa_tok_enc}"
-        fi
-
-        z_sa_infix="depot_state_sa_${z_global_project_index}_${z_sa_page}"
-        rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_sa_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_sa_infix}" || true
-
-        z_sa_list_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_sa_infix}") || z_sa_list_code=""
-        if test "${z_sa_list_code}" != "200"; then
-          buc_log_args "Skipping project (SA list HTTP ${z_sa_list_code}): ${z_project_id}"
-          break
-        fi
-
-        z_sa_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_sa_infix}" '.accounts // [] | length') \
-          || z_sa_count=0
-
-        z_sa_index=0
-        while test "${z_sa_index}" -lt "${z_sa_count}"; do

-        test -n "${z_sa_page_token}" || break
-        z_sa_page=$((z_sa_page + 1))
-      done

-        buc_log_args "Skipping project — no Mason SA found: ${z_project_id}"
+      z_project_id=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_search_infix}" ".projects[${z_index}].projectId") \
+        || { z_index=$((z_index + 1)); continue; }
+
+      z_display_name=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_search_infix}" ".projects[${z_index}].displayName") \
+        || { z_index=$((z_index + 1)); continue; }

+      # Strip the anchor prefix (including trailing space) to get the moniker.

+    test -n "${z_search_page_token}" || break
+    z_search_page=$((z_search_page + 1))
   done

file.content:
# Single-shot per dispatch — buf_write_fact_multi dies on preexist.
#
# Args: <oauth_access_token>
zrbgp_depot_state_emit() {
  zrbgp_sentinel

  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "zrbgp_depot_state_emit: token required"

  local -r z_search_query="displayName:${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX}*"
  local -r z_search_url_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V3}/projects:search"

  # Anchor prefix string used inside loop for displayName stripping.
  local -r z_display_prefix="${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX} "

  # Per-iteration synthesized locals (BCG exception 2 — declare outside, assign inside)
  local z_search_page=1
  local z_search_page_token=""
  local z_search_url=""
  local z_query_enc=""
  local z_tok_enc=""
  local z_search_infix=""
  local z_project_count=0
  local z_index=0
  local z_project_id=""
  local z_display_name=""
  local z_crm_state=""
  local z_state=""
  local z_moniker_raw=""
  local z_moniker=""

  z_query_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_search_query}") \
    || buc_die "Failed to URL-encode CRM v3 search query"

  while :; do
    z_search_url="${z_search_url_base}?query=${z_query_enc}"
    if test -n "${z_search_page_token}"; then
      z_tok_enc=$(rbgu_urlencode_capture "${z_search_page_token}") \
        || buc_die "Failed to URL-encode CRM v3 pageToken"
      z_search_url="${z_search_url}&pageToken=${z_tok_enc}"
    fi

    z_search_infix="depot_state_search_${z_search_page}"
    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_search_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_search_infix}"
    rbgu_http_require_ok "CRM v3 projects:search" "${z_search_infix}"

    z_project_count=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_search_infix}" '.projects // [] | length') \
      || z_project_count=0

    z_index=0
    while test "${z_index}" -lt "${z_project_count}"; do
      z_crm_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_search_infix}" ".projects[${z_index}].state") \
        || { z_index=$((z_index + 1)); continue; }

      if test "${z_crm_state}" = "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
        z_state="${RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_DELETE_REQUESTED}"
      elif test "${z_crm_state}" = "ACTIVE"; then
        z_state="${RBGP_DEPOT_STATE_COMPLETE}"
      else
        buc_log_args "Skipping project with unrecognized state: ${z_crm_state}"
        z_index=$((z_index + 1))
        continue
      fi

      z_project_id=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_search_infix}" ".projects[${z_index}].projectId") \
        || { z_index=$((z_index + 1)); continue; }

      z_display_name=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_search_infix}" ".projects[${z_index}].displayName") \
        || { z_index=$((z_index + 1)); continue; }

      # Strip the anchor prefix (including trailing space) to get the moniker.
      # displayName format: "${RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX} <moniker>"
      if [[ "${z_display_name}" != "${z_display_prefix}"* ]]; then
        buc_log_args "Skipping project — displayName does not match anchor: ${z_display_name}"
        z_index=$((z_index + 1))
        continue
      fi
      z_moniker_raw="${z_display_name#"${z_display_prefix}"}"

      # Extract the first word as the moniker (depot project format: "<prefix> <moniker>")
      z_moniker="${z_moniker_raw%% *}"

      # Validate moniker is RBRR-canonical: ^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$
      if ! [[ "${z_moniker}" =~ ^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$ ]]; then
        buc_log_args "Skipping project — moniker fails validation (${z_moniker}): ${z_display_name}"
        z_index=$((z_index + 1))
        continue
      fi

      buf_write_fact_multi "${z_moniker}" "${RBCC_fact_ext_depot}"         "${z_state}"
      buf_write_fact_multi "${z_moniker}" "${RBCC_fact_ext_depot_project}" "${z_project_id}"

      z_index=$((z_index + 1))
    done

    z_search_page_token=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_search_infix}" '.nextPageToken') \
      || z_search_page_token=""
    test -n "${z_search_page_token}" || break
    z_search_page=$((z_search_page + 1))
  done

content.text: Found one BCG/CLAUDE.md violation in the bash diff: over-defensive first-word extraction (`%% *`) for a scenario that can't happen — projects:search returns only projects (single-word moniker), and the regex validation already catches anomalies. The intermediate `z_moniker_raw` + first-word strip is non-load-bearing complexity. Fixing it.

        continue
      fi
      z_moniker="${z_display_name#"${z_display_prefix}"}"

      # Validate moniker is RBRR-canonical: ^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$
      if ! [[ "${z_moniker}" =~ ^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$ ]]; then
        buc_log_args "Skipping project — moniker fails validation (${z_moniker}): ${z_display_name}"
        z_index=$((z_index + 1))
        continue
      fi

lines: -      # Extract the first word as the moniker (depot project format: "<prefix> <moniker>")

## Summary — ₢BBAAm work complete

**Files modified (7):**
- `rbgc_Constants.sh` — added `RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX="RBGC_DEPOT_COMMON"` anchor constant
- `rbgp_Payor.sh` — replaced Cloud Billing v1 + Mason-SA gate with CRM v3 `projects:search`; updated 3 displayName creation sites; removed `RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID` requirement for depot_list
- `rbtdrk_canonical.rs` / `rbtdtk_canonical.rs` — bumped family stem `canest` → `canest2`; strengthened `pick_next_moniker` caller-contract doc
- `RBSDE-depot_levy.adoc`, `RBSGM-governor_mantle.adoc` — updated displayName text
- `RBSDL-depot_list.adoc` — substantial rewrite around CRM v3 search + DELETE_REQUESTED visibility

**Wrap-criterion coverage:**
- ✅ `rbw-dl` shows DELETE_REQUESTED alongside ACTIVE (CRM v3 search returns both states)
- ✅ Fact-file refresh contract documented in `pick_next_moniker`
- ✅ RBGC kindle owns the displayName anchor, threaded through depot/Mason/Governor sites + search
- ✅ Mason-SA discrimination removed; moniker derived by stripping prefix from displayName
- ✅ CRM v3 `projects:search` replaces Cloud Billing enumeration
- ✅ Family stem bumped (`canest` → `canest2`)
- ✅ RBSDE / RBSGM / RBSDL specs in sync

**BCG review fix:** removed over-defensive `z_moniker_raw` + first-word strip (`%% *`) — projects:search returns only depot projects with single-word moniker; regex validation already rejects malformed input.

**Verification:**
- `bash -n` clean on all three bash files
- `tt/rbtd-b.Build.sh` clean
- `tt/rbtd-t.Test.sh` all theurge unit tests pass (86/86 from Rust agent's earlier run)
- `tt/rbtd-s.TestSuite.fast.sh`: 25/26 — single failure is the known `rbtdrf_rv_rbrv_all_vessels` carry-forward baseline, unrelated to depot/SA code

**Not run:** service tier (would actually exercise the new CRM v3 search backend against GCP) and pristine-walkthrough — both cost-bearing and require the operator's burn-the-bridges depot teardown to be a clean test of the new flow.

Ready for you to notch ₢BBAAm? Or want me to review any specific file before you wrap?

params.intent: depot-list-via-displayname-search: switch depot enumeration from Cloud Billing v1 + Mason-SA gate to CRM v3 projects:search filtered by displayName anchor. Surfaces DELETE_REQUESTED projects (previously invisible because billing is unlinked at unmake before soft-delete), eliminating the ₢BBAAc collision class where canonical-establish auto-pick chose monikers reserved by ghost soft-deleted projectIds. Adds RBGC_DEPOT_DISPLAY_PREFIX='RBGC_DEPOT_COMMON' as the load-bearing constant in rbgc_Constants.sh; threads it through three displayName creation sites in rbgp_Payor.sh (depot project, Mason SA, Governor SA — Governor's displayName previously had no moniker, now includes it for parity). Replaces zrbgp_depot_state_emit's billing-list + per-project SA-scan with a single CRM v3 projects:search call paginated by nextPageToken. State comes back in the search response (no separate CRM v1 lookup); moniker is derived by stripping the anchor + space prefix from displayName, regex-validated against ^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$. RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID requirement removed from depot_list (still required at depot_levy for billing link). RBTDRK_FAMILY_STEM bumped 'canest' → 'canest2' to side-step pending-delete projectId reservations from burn-the-bridges teardown. Strengthened rbtdrk_pick_next_moniker doc-comment with the load-bearing caller contract (list_result must come from a freshly-invoked depot_list in the current process). Specs RBSDE/RBSGM updated for new displayName text; RBSDL substantially rewritten around CRM v3 search + DELETE_REQUESTED visibility note. Verification: bash -n clean; tt/rbtd-b.Build.sh clean; tt/rbtd-t.Test.sh 86/86 theurge unit tests pass; tt/rbtd-s.TestSuite.fast.sh 25/26 with rbtdrf_rv_rbrv_all_vessels as the documented carry-forward baseline (same as BBAAh, unrelated to depot/SA code). Service-tier and pristine walkthrough deferred — they require operator burn-the-bridges teardown to land first.
